exampleCn: 当她把钱包放在座位上无人看管时，她把钱包弄丢了。

example: Neil spent five years living in Japan and came back speaking the language fluently and naturally.
exampleCn: 尼尔在日本生活了五年回来时日语说得流利自然。

meaning: a. 宪法的, 立宪的, 体质的\n[医] 全身的; 体质的

exampleCn: 宪法步行。

example: She left home at the age of eighteen to study medicine at a university across the country.
exampleCn: 她十八岁时离开家去全国另一头的一所大学学医。

example: His students followed him like sheep.
exampleCn: 他的学生像羊一样跟随他。

meaning: n. 出版者, 发行人\n[法] 发行人, 出版者, 报刊发行者

exampleCn: 经过三年的写作她终于为她的第一本小说找到了出版商。

example: Patrick spends every free weekend hiking in the mountains with his two dogs by his side.
exampleCn: 帕特里克每个空闲的周末都带着他的两条狗去山里徒步。

meaning: n. 约瑟夫（男子名）；约瑟（圣经中雅各的第十一子）

exampleCn: 约瑟夫辞去了城市的工作在一个安静的海边小镇开了一家小面包店。

example: She spent a year backpacking across Asia and came home with thousands of photographs and stories.
exampleCn: 她用了一年时间背包穿越亚洲带回家成千上万的照片和故事。

example: The winters in Moscow can be brutally cold with temperatures dropping well below twenty degrees below zero.
exampleCn: 莫斯科的冬天可能冷得刺骨气温降到零下二十度以下。

meaning: a. 讲述的, 叙述的；有关系的, 有关联的

exampleCn: 目击者讲述了事件经过。

meaning: n. 视野范围, 知识范围, 见地

exampleCn: 她深深怜悯地看着那只被遗弃的小狗当天就决定把它带回家。

example: The processing of newly arrived immigrants.
exampleCn: 新来移民的处理。

meaning: n. 安装启用, 实行, 履行\n[计] 实施; 实现

exampleCn: 该机构是为了执行该政策而设立的。

meaning: a. 奥林匹亚的, 奥林匹斯山的, 强有力的, 巨大的

meaning: vt. 借, 贷款给, 增添, 提供, 出租\nvi. 贷款

exampleCn: 我把我的车借给你。

meaning: n. 米, 米饭, 稻\nvt. 将...压成米粒状

exampleCn: 土豆米饭。

meaning: adv. 非常地, 很, 颇

exampleCn: 把房间漆成白色使它看起来大得多（或大得多）。

example: The border between the United States and Canada is the longest unguarded border in the world.

example: He is a true lover of classical music and attends at least two concerts every month.
exampleCn: 他是古典音乐的真正爱好者每个月至少参加两场音乐会。

meaning: n. 亚瑟（男子名）；亚瑟王（传说中六世纪前后英国的国王, 圆桌骑士团的首领）

exampleCn: 亚瑟每个星期六早上都在图书馆读关于古代历史和失落文明的书。

meaning: n. 狩猎, 猎狐, 探求\n[计] 寻找平衡; 寻找

exampleCn: 他们去森林里采野蘑菇回来时带回了两满篮子。

exampleCn: 她在布里斯托尔的大学学习工程学然后搬到伦敦做第一份工作。

meaning: n. 请教, 咨询, 磋商会\n[医] 会诊

meaning: n. 橄榄球, 橄榄球赛

exampleCn: 救援小队在收到紧急求救信号后一小时内赶到了山上。

example: The days start to get noticeably longer here once we reach the middle of Feb each year.
exampleCn: 每年一到二月中旬白昼就开始明显变长。

example: They always go camping by the lake in early Aug before the summer crowds start to thin out.
exampleCn: 他们总是在八月初去湖边露营趁夏季人群开始散去之前。

meaning: n. 起立, 持续, 身分\na. 立着的, 不动的, 经常的, 持续的

exampleCn: 地位平等。

meaning: adv. 自动地, 机械地

meaning: n. 欢喜, 乐事, 高兴\nvt. 使快乐, 令人高兴\nvi. 欢喜

meaning: n. 发射, 猎场, 射击

meaning: adv. 可能地, 潜在地

meaning:
prep. 直到, 在...以前, 迄
conj. 直到...为止
vt. 耕种
n. 放钱的抽屉, 备用现金, 冰碛

exampleCn: 直到土。

example: Politically correct clothing.
exampleCn: 政治正确的服装。

meaning: n. 游泳, 漂浮, 潮流, 眩晕\nvi. 游泳, 游, 漂浮, 浸, 覆盖, 充溢, 大量拥有, 旋转, 眩晕\nvt. 游过, 使浮起

meaning: n. 含锡砾石下的无矿基岩；钢

exampleCn: 水边那些老商行曾经处理了这座城市大部分的丝绸外贸交易。

exampleCn: 基思在他的车库工作室里修复老爷车已经快二十年了。

meaning: a. 肮脏的, 卑鄙的\nvt. 弄脏\nvi. 变脏

meaning: a. 老的, 陈的, 有...岁的\n[化] 老化的; 老化了的; 陈化的; 陈化了的

exampleCn: 财政部宣布了新一轮减税措施旨在帮助小企业复苏和增长。

meaning:

exampleCn: 当妈妈来到幼儿园门口时蹒跚学步的孩子带着灿烂的笑容向她跑去。

example: The celebration of marriage.

meaning: a. 确信的, 深信的

meaning: n. 钢笔, 笔, 笔调, 笔杆子, 作家, 围栏, 栅栏, 禽畜\nvt. 写, 关入栏中, 囚禁\nvi. 动笔, 写作

meaning: n. 米, 公尺, 仪表, 计量器\nvt. 以仪表计量

exampleCn: 总统最亲密的助手在他身边工作了超过十五年从未间断。

exampleCn: 她从热水淋浴中出来后裹上了一件柔软的毛巾浴袍。

meaning: a. 诺曼第语的；诺曼第人的

example: Colin has been working on his first novel every evening after dinner for the past two years.

example: The blue bicycle parked outside the shop is definitely hers — I recognise the little bell.

example: He needed to grieve before he could achieve a sense of closure.

meaning: n. 监护, 拘留, 监禁\n[经] 保管, 照顾, 保护

exampleCn: 他已被警方拘留。

meaning: n. 生面团\n[化] 捏塑体; 生面团
example: She kneaded the dough gently on the floured counter and left it to rise for a whole hour.
exampleCn: 她在撒了面粉的台面上轻轻揉面团然后让它发酵整整一个小时。

meaning: a. 生态学的, 主张生态保护的\n[法] 生态的, 生态学的
example: An ecological disaster.
exampleCn: 一场生态灾难。

meaning: adv. 根据传说, 根据传闻, 据报道
example: She was reportedly his mistress for many years.
exampleCn: 据报道，她多年来一直是他的情妇。

meaning: n. 布赖顿（英国南部城市）
example: They took a day trip to Brighton and ate fish and chips by the seaside pier.
exampleCn: 他们去布莱顿一日游在海边码头旁吃了炸鱼薯条。

meaning: n. 米尔顿（男子名, 英国诗人）
example: Milton wrote some of the most celebrated poetry in the English language during his long lifetime.
exampleCn: 弥尔顿在他漫长的一生中写下了英语语言中最负盛名的一些诗歌。

meaning: n. 庄园\n[法] 采邑, 庄园, 采地
example: The old manor stood at the end of a tree-lined drive and had been empty for many decades.
exampleCn: 那座老庄园矗立在一条林荫车道尽头已经空置数十年了。

meaning: n. 试验, 试用, 锻炼
example: He always feels refreshed and full of energy after a good workout at the gym on Saturday mornings.
exampleCn: 他周六早上去健身房好好锻炼后总是感到精神焕发充满活力。

meaning: n. 汉密尔顿（男子名）；哈密尔顿（美国城市名）
example: Hamilton grew up in a small town and became a leading figure in the nation.
exampleCn: 汉密尔顿在一个小镇长大成为了该国的领军人物。

meaning: n. 安德森市（美国印第安纳州）；安德森（男子名）
example: Mr Anderson retired after forty years of teaching and the whole school gathered to say a fond farewell.
exampleCn: Anderson 先生教了四十年书后退休了全校师生聚在一起深情地告别。

meaning: n. 铅笔, 色笔, 眉笔, 画笔, 光线束\nvt. 用铅笔写或涂, 草拟
example: The words were scribbled in pencil.
exampleCn: 这些字是用铅笔潦草地写下来的。

example: Dennis spent his evenings restoring a classic motorbike in the garage with his two young sons helping.
exampleCn: 丹尼斯晚上在车库里修复一辆经典摩托车他的两个小儿子帮忙。

example: They visited Hungary last autumn and fell in love with the thermal baths and the stunning old architecture.
exampleCn: 他们去年秋天去了匈牙利爱上了温泉浴场和令人惊叹的古老建筑。

example: Duncan has been running a small organic farm on the edge of the village for nearly two decades.
exampleCn: 邓肯在村边经营一个小有机农场已经快二十年了。

example: Newton discovered gravity while sitting under an apple tree one sunny afternoon according to legend.
exampleCn: 据传说牛顿是在一个晴朗下午坐在苹果树下时发现了引力。

meaning: n. 约旦, 约旦河, 尿壶
example: She travelled to Jordan last spring to visit the ancient city of Petra carved into the rose-red cliffs.
exampleCn: 她去年春天去了约旦参观了雕刻在玫瑰红悬崖中的佩特拉古城。

meaning: n. 访客, 召集员, 传唤员\na. 新鲜的\n[计] 呼叫方标识
example: You need a fiddler and a caller for country dancing.
exampleCn: 乡村舞需要一名小提琴手和一名叫号员。

meaning: n. 突击, 出击, 远足\nvi. 突击, 出击, 出发
example: A sally into the wide world beyond his home.
exampleCn: 一次突袭，闯入家乡之外的广阔世界。

example: Ms Roberts has been the head nurse at the city hospital for more than fifteen dedicated years.
exampleCn: Roberts 女士在市医院做护士长已经兢兢业业超过十五年了。

meaning: num. 第八, 八分之一
example: She finished the marathon in eighth place out of two thousand runners and felt incredibly proud.
exampleCn: 她在两千名选手中以第八名完成了马拉松感到无比自豪。

meaning: n. 观光业, 游览\n[经] 旅游业
example: Tourism is a major business in Bermuda.
exampleCn: 旅游业是百慕大的一项主要产业。

example: Emma taught herself to play the piano during the long quiet months of winter in her hometown.
exampleCn: 艾玛在家乡漫长安静的冬季里自学了弹钢琴。

meaning: n. 接管, 接收\n[经] 接收
example: The takeover of the small startup by the larger company was completed at the end of last year.
exampleCn: 那家大公司对那家小型创业公司的收购于去年年底完成。

example: Louise spent her Sunday mornings volunteering at the animal shelter on the outskirts of the city.
exampleCn: 路易丝星期天早上在城郊的动物收容所做志愿者。

example: Julia packed a small bag and set off on a solo trip across three countries in eastern Europe.
exampleCn: 朱莉娅收拾了一个小背包独自出发穿越了东欧三个国家。

example: Mick has been playing folk songs on his guitar at the local pub every Friday night for years.
exampleCn: 米克多年来每个周五晚上都在当地酒馆弹吉他唱民歌。

meaning: n. 骑兵营, 分遣队, 小舰队
example: The squadron of fighter jets flew in perfect formation across the clear blue sky during the air show.
exampleCn: 战斗机中队在航空展期间以完美的编队飞过清澈的蓝天。

example: They camped beside a quiet loch and woke to birdsong at the first light of dawn.
exampleCn: 他们在安静的湖边露营在清晨第一缕阳光下的鸟鸣声中醒来。

meaning: 北大西洋公约组织, 北约组织\n[经] 北大西洋公约组织
example: NATO was formed in 1949 to provide collective security for its member states during the Cold War.
exampleCn: 北约于1949年成立旨在冷战时期为其成员国提供集体安全。

meaning: n. 一镑金币, 一镑, 咀嚼物
example: He lent me twenty quid for lunch and said I could pay him back anytime.
exampleCn: 他借给我二十英镑吃午饭说随时可以还。

meaning: n. 溃疡, 腐烂物\n[医] 溃疡
example: Stress and poor diet can lead to a painful stomach ulcer over time the doctor warned him sternly.
exampleCn: 医生严厉警告他说压力和不良饮食长期可能导致疼痛的胃溃疡。

meaning: n. （就重大政治或社会问题进行的）全民公决，全民投票
example: The government called a referendum on the proposed changes to the constitution and the turnout was remarkably high.
exampleCn: 政府就宪法修改提案举行了全民公投投票率异常高。

meaning: n. 外人, 局外人, 非会员, 外行, 门外汉, 比赛中获胜可能性不大的选手\n[经] 外船公司
example: She felt like an outsider at school until she joined the drama club and found her true passion.
exampleCn: 她在学校感觉自己像个局外人直到加入戏剧俱乐部找到真正的热情。

example: He cleared the cluttered icons from his desktop and organised all the files into neatly labelled folders.
exampleCn: 他清理了桌面上杂乱的图标把所有文件整理进标记整齐的文件夹里。

example: Someday you will understand my actions.
exampleCn: 总有一天你会明白我的行为。

example: Kinnock served as leader of the opposition for nearly a decade during the turbulent 1980s in Britain.
exampleCn: 金诺克在英国动荡的二十世纪八十年代担任了近十年的反对党领袖。

meaning: n. 消息, 真相, 情报\n[医] 基因, 遗传因子
example: Give me the gen on your new line of computers.
exampleCn: 给我你的新电脑系列的一代。

example: A genuinely open society.
exampleCn: 一个真正开放的社会。

meaning: a. 松懈的, 不严密的, 不严格的, 放松的, 得到休息的, 随意的, 不拘束的, 自在的
example: He relaxed in the hot tub.
exampleCn: 他在热水浴缸里放松下来。

meaning: a. 华美的, 富有色彩的, 有趣的
example: Colorful autumn leaves.
exampleCn: 色彩缤纷的秋叶。

example: She raised an eyebrow in surprise when she heard the unexpected news about her old friend from university.
exampleCn: 听到关于大学老朋友的意外消息时她惊讶地挑起了眉毛。

meaning: a. 组织的\n[法] 组织的, 编制的, 机构的
example: Organizational structure.
exampleCn: 组织结构。

meaning: 出现的, 发生的, 形成的
example: Scientists are closely watching the emerging virus strain that has appeared in several countries over the past month.
exampleCn: 科学家正密切关注上个月在几个国家出现的新的病毒株。

meaning: n. 制造, (手工)制造业, 制作, 形成, 发展, 要素, 内在因素, 赚头, 制造物
example: The making of measurements.
exampleCn: 测量的进行。

meaning: n. 困难, 阻碍, 困窘\n[医] 窘迫
example: The outcome of the vote was an embarrassment for the liberals.
exampleCn: 投票结果令自由派感到尴尬。

meaning: adv. 正确地, 精确地
example: He works very accurately.
exampleCn: 他工作非常准确。

example: They were driven from the marketplace.
exampleCn: 他们被赶出了市场。

meaning: adv. 公开地, 坦率地, 直率地, 公然地
example: He openly flaunted his affection for his sister.
exampleCn: 他公开表达了对妹妹的感情。

example: Extremely risky going out in the tide and fog.
exampleCn: 在潮汐和大雾中外出风险极大。

meaning: n. 计划者, 设计者, 安排者\n[机] 刨床机
example: The wedding planner made sure every tiny detail was perfect from the flowers to the seating arrangements.
exampleCn: 婚礼策划师确保从鲜花到座位安排的每个微小细节都完美无缺。

meaning: a. 最靠近的（close的最高级）
example: She moved to the chair closest to the fire and wrapped herself in a soft blanket.
exampleCn: 她移到离壁炉最近的椅子上用柔软的毯子裹住自己。

meaning: n. 呼吸, 瞬间, 微风\na. 呼吸的, 逼真的
example: The boy was disappointed to find only skeletons instead of living breathing dinosaurs.
exampleCn: 男孩很失望地发现只有骷髅而不是活生生的恐龙。

meaning: n. 移民, 移往, 移动\n[计] 迁移
example: The migration of birds heading south for the winter is one of nature's most spectacular annual events.
exampleCn: 鸟类南飞过冬的迁徙是大自然最壮观的年度事件之一。

example: They visited Belgium last spring to taste the famous chocolate and wander through the medieval streets of Bruges.
exampleCn: 他们去年春天去了比利时品尝著名的巧克力并在布鲁日的中世纪街道上漫步。

meaning: n. 零售商人, 传播的人\n[经] 零售商
example: The small retailer on the corner has sold bread and groceries to the neighbourhood for three generations.
exampleCn: 街角的小零售商向社区卖面包和杂货已经三代了。

meaning: adv. 真诚地, 公正地
example: Honestly, I don't believe it.
exampleCn: 老实说，我不相信。

meaning: n. 经营行为, 行为, 交易\n[法] 待遇, 处置, 行为
example: Honest dealing.
exampleCn: 诚信交易。

meaning: a. 支撑, 支承, 资助, 赞助, 支援, 经受, 忍受, 扶养, 证实, 鼓励, 维持, 伴奏
example: A supportive family network.
exampleCn: 支持性的家庭网络。

meaning: n. 波斯人, 波斯语

exampleCn: 大多数伊朗人是波斯什叶派穆斯林。

meaning: v. 感觉( perceive的过去式和过去分词 ); 视为; 认为; 理解为
example: She finally perceived the futility of her protest.
exampleCn: 她终于意识到自己的抗议是徒劳的。

meaning: n. 遵从, 顺从, 屈从\n[化] 柔顺; 顺应
example: The factory was inspected for compliance with the new safety regulations introduced at the start of the year.
exampleCn: 工厂接受了检查以确认其符合年初实施的新安全法规。

meaning: n. 专业, 专长, 特产, 特制品, 特性, 特点\na. 专门的, 独立的
example: Her specialty is restoring old oil paintings and she has worked on pieces from three different centuries.
exampleCn: 她的专长是修复古油画已修复过来自三个不同世纪的作品。

meaning: n. 猴子, 猿, 打桩锤\nvi. 淘气, 胡闹\nvt. 嘲弄
example: A cheeky monkey snatched a banana from the tourist's hand and scampered up the nearest tall tree.
exampleCn: 一只调皮的猴子从游客手里抢走一根香蕉窜上了最近的树。

meaning: n. 奥斯卡金像奖, 钱, 现金
example: The film won an Oscar for best screenplay and the writer's moving speech brought the audience to tears.
exampleCn: 这部电影获得了奥斯卡最佳剧本奖编剧感人的演讲让观众落泪。

example: She is a careful listener who always remembers the small details that others mention in casual conversation.
exampleCn: 她是一个细心的倾听者总是记得别人在随意交谈中提到的小细节。

example: Stanley spent his gap year building schools in remote villages across three different countries in Africa.
exampleCn: 斯坦利用间隔年在非洲三个不同国家的偏远村庄建学校。

meaning: n. 肯尼迪（姓氏, 美国第35任总统）
example: Kennedy delivered one of the most memorable speeches in modern history during his visit to the city.
exampleCn: 肯尼迪访问该市时发表了现代史上最令人难忘的演讲之一。

meaning: adv. 法律上, 合法地\n[法] 法律上, 合法地, 法定地
example: He acted legally.
exampleCn: 他的行为是合法的。

meaning: adv. 独立地, 自立地
example: The children worked on the project independently.
exampleCn: 孩子们独立完成了这个项目。

meaning: a. 无聊的；烦人的；无趣的
example: Bored with life.
exampleCn: 对生活感到厌倦。

meaning: n. 诺福克(英格兰郡名)
example: They rented a cottage in Norfolk for the summer and spent their days walking along the windswept beaches.
exampleCn: 他们夏天在诺福克租了一座小屋每天在被风吹拂的沙滩上散步。

example: The next petrol station is a kilometre away so we had better make sure we have fuel.
exampleCn: 下一个加油站在一公里以外我们最好确保有足够的汽油。

meaning: a. 注册的, 登记过的, 记名的, 挂号的\n[法] 已注册的, 已登记的, 挂号的
example: A registered Percheron.
exampleCn: 已注册的佩尔什龙。

example: Mr Davis has run the village post office for so long that nobody remembers anyone else.
exampleCn: Davis先生经营村邮局太久了没人记得有别人做过。

example: Churchill led the country through its darkest hours and his speeches inspired millions to keep fighting for freedom.
exampleCn: 丘吉尔在最黑暗的时刻领导了国家他的演讲激励了数百万人继续为自由而斗争。

example: The plan was finally approved, albeit with several important amendments attached to the final version of it.
exampleCn: 该计划终于获批尽管最终版本附有几项重要修正条款。

meaning: a. 中途的, 不彻底的, 部分的\nadv. 半路地, 在中途, 在半途
example: At the halfway mark.
exampleCn: 到了一半的时候。

meaning: a. 发展的, 进化的, 启发的\n[医] 发育的
example: Developmental psychology.
exampleCn: 发展心理学。

meaning: n. 墓地, 公墓\n[法] 公墓, 墓地
example: They walked through the old cemetery on the hill reading the faded names on the grey tombstones.
exampleCn: 他们穿过山上的老公墓读着灰色墓碑上褪色的名字。

meaning: n. 困扰, 烦扰, 烦恼\n[法] 折磨, 骚扰, 侵扰
example: So great was his harassment that he wanted to destroy his tormentors.
exampleCn: 他的骚扰如此之大，以至于他想消灭那些折磨他的人。

meaning: a. 挑选出来的, 精选的\n[计] 被选的
example: She selected a pair of shoes from among the dozen the salesgirl had shown her.
exampleCn: 她从售货员给她展示的十几双鞋中挑选了一双。

meaning: n. 预约演出合同\n[机] 书型模法
example: Wondered who had made the booking.
exampleCn: 想知道是谁预订的。

meaning: n. 针织短外衣, 斜桁纵帆
example: Spencer wrote a detailed history of the small village where he was born and raised during his retirement.
exampleCn: 斯宾塞退休后撰写了一部关于他出生和长大的那个小村庄的详细历史。

example: The new building has a ramp and wide doors to make it accessible for anyone using a wheelchair.
exampleCn: 新建筑设有坡道和宽门使任何使用轮椅的人都能无障碍通行。

meaning: n. 土耳其语\na. 土耳其的, 土耳其人的, 土耳其语的
example: Turkish towels.
exampleCn: 土耳其毛巾。

meaning: adv. 在顶上\nprep. 在...的顶上
example: The cat sat atop the old wall watching the birds flutter between the branches of the cherry tree.
exampleCn: 猫坐在老墙顶上看着鸟儿在樱桃树的枝头间飞来飞去。

meaning: a. 计划了的, 预定的, 根据计划的, 有组织的\n[法] 有计划的, 计划的, 有秩序的
example: The rebels had planned turmoil and confusion.
exampleCn: 叛乱分子计划制造骚乱和混乱。

example: Was embarrassed by her child's tantrums.
exampleCn: 因孩子的脾气而感到尴尬。

example: Thou shalt not forget the kindness shown to thee by a stranger on a cold and rainy night.
exampleCn: 汝不应忘记一个寒冷雨夜陌生人对你的善意。

meaning: a. 减少的；简化的；缩减的
example: He reduced the population to slavery.
exampleCn: 他使人口沦为奴隶。

example: Mr Thompson taught himself the fiddle at sixty and now performs at the local folk club every week.
exampleCn: Thompson 先生六十岁自学了小提琴现在每周都在当地的民歌俱乐部表演。

example: Betty has been baking apple pies for the village fair every single autumn for more than forty years.
exampleCn: 贝蒂每年秋天为村里的集市烤苹果派已经四十多年了。

meaning: n. 性征, 性行为, 性欲\n[医] 性别, 性欲
example: The book explores themes of love and sexuality with remarkable honesty for a novel written in its time.
exampleCn: 这本书以那个时代小说中非凡的坦诚探讨了爱情与性的主题。

meaning: n. 立法者, 立法官, 立法委员\n[法] 立法者, 立法机关成员, 立法委员
example: The legislator introduced a new bill to improve public transport in rural areas across the entire state.
exampleCn: 那位立法委员提出了一项旨在改善全州农村地区公共交通的新法案。

meaning: n. 节目的计划, 编制程序\n[计] 程序设计; 程序编制
example: She studied programming at university and now builds mobile apps for a living in the city.
exampleCn: 她在大学学编程现在在城市里以开发移动应用为生。

example: Alison spent her summer volunteering at a wildlife hospital on the coast of Cornwall.
exampleCn: 艾莉森夏天在康沃尔海岸的野生动物医院做志愿者。

meaning: n. 亚伯丁（英国苏格兰一郡 ）；苏格兰粗毛猎狐狗（等于Aberdeenterrier）
example: They visited Aberdeen last winter and were charmed by its grey granite buildings and cosy pubs.
exampleCn: 他们去年冬天去了亚伯丁被那里灰色花岗岩建筑和舒适的酒馆迷住了。

meaning: n. 花生, 小人物, 极小的数额\na. 渺小的, 微不足道的
example: Peanut politicians.
exampleCn: 花生政客。

meaning: n. 评价, 估价, 价值判断\n[经] 估价, 计价, 评价
example: He set a high valuation on friendship.
exampleCn: 他对友谊给予了很高的评价。

example: The resulting delay forced everyone to change their travel plans.
exampleCn: 由此产生的延误迫使所有人改变旅行计划。

meaning: vt. 表示...的特性, 成为/是...的特性, 刻划/描述...的性格\nvi. 在文艺作品中塑造人物, 描绘性格
example: The author characterises the hero as a quiet but deeply determined young woman from the countryside.
exampleCn: 作者将主人公描绘成一个安静但意志坚定的乡村年轻女子。

example: They cycled through the Netherlands last spring and were amazed by the endless fields of colourful tulips.
exampleCn: 他们去年春天骑车穿过荷兰被无边无际的彩色郁金香田所惊艳。

example: Julie spent her weekends baking elaborate birthday cakes for children at the local hospital.
exampleCn: 朱莉周末在当地医院为孩子们烤精美的生日蛋糕。

exampleCn: 飞鸟的主题贯穿她的画作始终象征着自由和对家的思念。

example: Lisa trained for the marathon every weekend and raised two thousand pounds for the cancer charity.
exampleCn: 丽莎每个周末为马拉松训练为癌症慈善机构筹集了两千英镑。

meaning: n. 幺点, 好手, 少许, 发球得分\na. 一流的, 杰出的\n[计] 应答允许, 自适应计算机试验, 自动呼叫设备, 自动执行控制
example: An ace reporter.
exampleCn: 王牌记者。

meaning: n. 促进者, 助长者\n[化] 助催化剂
example: The promoter worked tirelessly for months to book the best bands for the summer festival.
exampleCn: 推广人不知疲倦地工作了数月为夏季音乐节预约最好的乐队。

example: The EEC was founded in 1957 and later evolved into what we now know as the European Union.
exampleCn: 欧洲经济共同体成立于1957年后来演变成今天的欧盟。

meaning: n. 学习者, 初学者
example: She is a quick learner and mastered the new software basics in under a single working week.
exampleCn: 她学得很快不到一周就掌握了新软件基础。

example: Sophie spent her Sunday afternoons painting watercolour landscapes of the quiet countryside near her grandmother's cottage.
exampleCn: 索菲星期天下午在奶奶小屋附近用画水彩风景画描绘安静的乡间。

example: The guerrilla fighters hid deep in the jungle and struck the enemy forces under cover of darkness.
exampleCn: 游击队员躲在丛林深处在夜色掩护下袭击敌军。

meaning: n. 萨拉族, 萨拉人
example: Sara spent a year in a remote African village helping to dig wells and teach children hygiene.
exampleCn: 萨拉在非洲一个偏远村庄生活了一年帮助打井和教孩子们卫生知识。

example: Milk and cheese are rich in calcium which is vital for building strong healthy bones in children.
exampleCn: 牛奶和奶酪富含钙对儿童构建强壮健康骨骼至关重要。

meaning: n. 加百利(<<经经>>中七大天使之一)
example: Gabriel composed music each evening in a tiny studio he had built in the attic of his flat.
exampleCn: 加百利每晚在公寓阁楼搭建的小录音室里作曲。

meaning: a. 有组织的, 组织起来的
example: How well organized she is.
exampleCn: 她的组织能力多么好。

meaning: n. 私有化, 非国营化（将国营企业转为民营）

exampleCn: 铁路的私有化引发了关于服务是否真正为普通乘客改善的激烈辩论。

meaning: n. 节, 结节, 瘤\n[计] 节点; 结点
example: The new network links five hundred nodes on campus and makes file sharing between departments faster.
exampleCn: 新网络连接校园五百多个节点使部门间文件共享更快。

example: Isabel packed a bag and set off on a solo journey across the mountains of Patagonia at twenty.
exampleCn: 伊莎贝尔二十岁时收拾了包独自出发穿越巴塔哥尼亚的群山。

example: Yep I would love to join you for a coffee after work if you are free around six.
exampleCn: 是的如果你六点左右有空我很乐意下班后和你一起喝咖啡。

meaning: n. 浆液, 血清, 乳清\n[医] 血清; 浆液
example: The doctor injected the serum into the patient and waited to see if there was any adverse reaction.
exampleCn: 医生给病人注射了血清等待观察是否有任何不良反应。

meaning: a. 更简单；较早的；容易些（easy的比较级形式）
example: The new app makes it much easier for small firms to track expenses and manage their accounts online.
exampleCn: 新应用让小公司更容易在线追踪支出和管理账户。

meaning: a. 全国性的\n[法] 全国的, 全国范围的
example: The event aroused nationwide interest.
exampleCn: 此次活动引起全国关注。

meaning: n. 小溪, 小河, 小湾
example: The creek dried up every summer.
exampleCn: 每年夏天，小溪都会干涸。

meaning: n. 横越, 横渡, 交叉点, 渡口\n[经] 划线
example: They stood at the pedestrian crossing waiting for the green light before stepping onto the busy road together.
exampleCn: 他们站在人行横道处等着绿灯亮起然后一起踏上繁忙的马路。

meaning: n. 道歉, 辩护\n[法] 道歉, 谢罪, 辩解者
example: He wrote a letter of apology to the hostess.
exampleCn: 他给女主人写了一封道歉信。

meaning: a. 宽慰的, 解除的, 减轻的
example: The thief relieved me of $100.
exampleCn: 小偷偷走了我100美元。

meaning: n. 网站（全球资讯网的主机站）
example: She spent the afternoon redesigning the company website to make it more user-friendly and attractive to new visitors.
exampleCn: 她整个下午都在重新设计公司网站使其对用户更友好对新访客更有吸引力。

meaning: v. 砍；斩碎；大量削减（chop的过去分词）

exampleCn: 蛤蜊切碎。

meaning: n. 轰炸机, 投弹手
example: The old bomber flew thirty missions during the war and is now on display at the aviation museum.
exampleCn: 那架老轰炸机在战争期间执行了三十次任务现在在航空博物馆展出。

meaning: n. 抽烟, 冒烟\n[医] 烟熏; 吸烟

exampleCn: 抽烟很臭。

meaning: prep. 就...而论\nconj. 考虑到
example: Considering how late we left we were lucky to catch the last train home before midnight struck.
exampleCn: 考虑到我们出发有多晚我们很幸运在午夜前赶上了最后一班回家的火车。

example: She studied at a tech college for two years before landing her first job at a city startup.
exampleCn: 她在技术学院学了两年后在城里创业公司找到第一份工作。

meaning: a. 有礼貌的, 文雅的, 客气的, 有教养的

exampleCn: 有礼貌的社会。

example: Foolish remarks.
exampleCn: 愚蠢的言论。

meaning: n. 失败者, 遗失者\n[法] 失败者, 失物者, 遗失者
example: He was a gracious loser and warmly shook hands with his opponent after the final match on Saturday.
exampleCn: 他是个有风度的输家周六决赛后热情地与对手握手。

meaning: a. 挑战的, 引起争论的

exampleCn: 无错误地完成了最具挑战性的任务。

meaning: n. 清洁, 扫除, 家畜的胞衣, 扫除出来的垃圾, 大败, 输得精光, 除伐, 巨额利润\n[计] 清洗, 清除
example: He gave his shoes a good cleaning.
exampleCn: 他把鞋子好好地擦干净了。

meaning: n. 滑雪运动, 滑雪术
example: They go skiing in the Alps every winter and have explored nearly every major resort in three countries.
exampleCn: 他们每年冬天去阿尔卑斯山滑雪已探索了三个国家的几乎所有主要度假胜地。

example: She showed deep compassion toward the stray cats in her street and fed them every single morning.
exampleCn: 她对街上的流浪猫表现出深深的同情每天早上都喂养它们。

meaning: a. 投入的, 深爱的
example: This land was devoted to mining.
exampleCn: 这片土地专门用于采矿。

meaning: n. 集合, 聚集\n[法] 集会, 人一, 红衣主教会议

exampleCn: 一群孩子请求他签名。

meaning: adv. 美好地, 漂亮地

exampleCn: 她的脸化得很漂亮。

meaning: a. 伊朗的, 伊朗语系的\nn. 伊朗人, 伊朗语

exampleCn: 伊朗山脉。

example: The police found marijuana hidden in a van during a routine check on the motorway last night.
exampleCn: 警方昨晚在高速公路例行检查时发现一辆货车藏有大麻。

meaning: n. 义勇军, 民兵组织, 国民军

exampleCn: 他们的部队是未经训练的民兵。

meaning: n. 享有, 保有期\n[经] (财产,职位等的)占有, 占有权

exampleCn: 经过多年发表重要研究和教导学生后她终于获得了大学的终身教职。

meaning: n. 抽屉, 小柜, 上锁人\n[机] 锁柜

exampleCn: 他把包塞进储物柜匆匆赶去五分钟后开始的会议。

meaning: n. 后退, 衬背, 后援, 支持者\n[化] 衬垫

exampleCn: 他对保守派的大力支持给他带来了进步派的麻烦。

meaning: a. 肯定的, 赞成的, 积极的\nn. 肯定语

exampleCn: 他的回答是肯定的。

meaning: n. 不一致, 变化, 变异, 分歧, 不和\n[化] 方差; 变种

exampleCn: 分区差异。

exampleCn: 在澳大利亚发现的瓦勒迈松是一种幸存的针叶树标本，人们认为这种针叶树早已灭绝，因此被称为活化石。

meaning: n. 清洁工人, 清洁剂, 干洗商\n[化] 滤清器; 除垢器; 洗净剂; 清洁剂

exampleCn: 更清洁、更高效的发动机。

meaning: n. 等级, 地位\na. 上级的, 头等的, 超群的

exampleCn: 该大学多年来一直在全国工程研究排名中稳居首位。

meaning: a. 打昏迷的, 弄得人昏头昏脑的, 令人震惊的
example: A stunning performance.
exampleCn: 令人惊叹的表演。

example: They stood in the cold stream and caught three large trout before the sun dipped behind the hills.
exampleCn: 他们在冰冷溪流中站着在太阳落到山后前钓到三条大鳟鱼。

meaning: n. 牛仔, 牛郎, 牧童
example: The cowboy rode across the plain at sunset with his hat low and his dog by his side.
exampleCn: 牛仔日落时骑马穿过平原帽子低低拉着狗跟在身边。

example: The festival celebrated Latino culture with live music and dancing until the early morning hours.
exampleCn: 节日以持续到凌晨的现场音乐和舞蹈来庆祝拉丁美洲文化。

meaning: a. 数不尽的, 无数的

exampleCn: 无数个小时。

example: She moved swiftly.
exampleCn: 她动作很快。

meaning: a. 卖的, 销路好的, 出售的\n[经] 卖盘, 出售, 销路好

exampleCn: 她开始在市场卖自制果酱一年内就建立起了兴旺的小生意。

meaning: a. 即将来临的, 即将出现的

exampleCn: 即将到来的春季时装。

exampleCn: 他们去年秋天开车穿过弗吉尼亚被到处变色的树叶的绚丽色彩迷住了。

meaning: num. 第九, 九分之一

exampleCn: 进入第九局时，他们领先。

example: His compositions always started with the lyrics.
exampleCn: 他的作品总是从歌词开始。

example: His gambling cost him a fortune.
exampleCn: 他的赌博让他损失了一大笔钱。

example: Harold spent his retirement writing a history of the village where he had lived all his life.
exampleCn: 哈罗德退休后撰写了一部关于他生活了一辈子的村庄的历史。

example: Herbert has kept bees in his garden for twenty years and supplies honey to the whole neighbourhood.
exampleCn: 赫伯特在花园养蜂二十年了向周围社区供应蜂蜜。

meaning: n. 拥护, 支持, 鼓吹, 辩护, 辩护术\n[法] 辩护, 拥护, 提倡

exampleCn: 她为儿童权益的倡导帮助改善了当地学校的安全规定。

meaning: a. 领土的, 土地的, 地方的, 区域性的\nn. 本土自卫队队员

exampleCn: 维尔京群岛领土政府。

meaning: n. 抗生素\na. 抗生的

exampleCn: 医生给她开了抗生素在胸部感染扩散之前清除它。

meaning: n. 车工, 体育协会会员

exampleCn: 车工用他那做了几十年的稳手在车床上把木腿塑造出来。

meaning: n. 上帝, 创造者, 创作者
example: She is the creator of a popular online course that has helped thousands learn to paint with watercolours.
exampleCn: 她是一门受欢迎的在线课程的创建者该课程帮助了成千上万人学习水彩画。

meaning: a. 有关建筑的, 建筑学的

meaning: n. 兰开斯特（美国成市）

exampleCn: 他因上大学搬到兰开斯特很快就爱上了历史悠久的城堡及其景色。

meaning: a. 无法接受的, 不受欢迎的\n[法] 不能接受的, 不受欢迎的, 难以承认的

exampleCn: 教练告诉他的队员们，失败是不可接受的。

meaning: n. 制桶工人\nv. 制桶

exampleCn: 老制桶匠仍然在他的作坊里用手工做桶技巧已传承了四代人。

exampleCn: 他们去年秋天去了布拉德福德看摄影博物馆和令人惊叹的老工业建筑。

meaning: num. 第十七, 十七分之一

exampleCn: 她在镇上最喜欢的意大利餐馆举办了一场小型晚宴来庆祝她的十七岁生日。

meaning: n. 汉普郡（英国南部之一郡）

exampleCn: 他们去年春天花了一周在汉普郡绿色的乡间和古老林地中散步。

exampleCn: 他的转盘上的速度控制器无法正常工作。

meaning: n. 拳击\n[医] 围模(牙科)

exampleCn: 他十二岁开始练拳击到二十岁时已经赢得了三个全国冠军。

meaning: n. 组织者, 编制者, 创立者, 组织导体\n[医] 组织导体, 机化中心(胚)
example: She was the organizer of the meeting.
exampleCn: 她是这次会议的组织者。

example: His inability to admit mistakes made it very hard for the team to trust him on important projects.
exampleCn: 他无法承认错误使得团队在重要项目上很难信任他。

example: Dr Watson spent forty years researching the causes of the disease before finally publishing his findings.
exampleCn: Watson 医生花了四十年研究这种疾病的成因终于发表了他的发现。

meaning: n. 阿尔佛雷德（男子名）
example: Alfred taught himself to play chess at sixty and now beats opponents half his age at the local.
exampleCn: 阿尔弗雷德六十岁自学下棋现在在当地俱乐部能打败年龄只有他一半的对手。

example: Ralph spent his summers sailing along the rugged coast and camping under the stars on empty beaches.
exampleCn: 拉尔夫夏天沿着崎岖的海岸航行在空旷的星空下沙滩上露营。

example: Trevor has been working as a volunteer at the homeless shelter every Christmas for the past ten years.
exampleCn: 特雷弗过去十年来每个圣诞节都在无家可归者收容所做志愿者。

meaning: n. 低沉的声音, 男低音, 椴树\na. 低音的
example: A bass voice is lower than a baritone voice.
exampleCn: 低音比男中音低。

meaning: 数据加密标准, 数据输入系统, 显示编辑系统
example: She studied the DES encryption standard as part of her computer science degree at the university in London.
exampleCn: 她在伦敦大学攻读计算机科学学位时研究了DES加密标准。

meaning: a. 有光泽的, 发光的, 辉煌的, 磨光的, 磨损的
example: Saw the moon like a shiny dime on a deep blue velvet carpet.
exampleCn: 看到月亮就像深蓝色天鹅绒地毯上闪亮的一角硬币。

meaning: n. 备忘录\n[经] 备忘录

exampleCn: 他给团队发了一份快速备忘录提醒大家周五下午的项目截止日期。

meaning: n. 萨福克（英国东部一郡）；萨克福马；萨福克羊
example: They rented a cottage in Suffolk for the summer and spent their days exploring the quiet coastal villages.
exampleCn: 他们夏天在萨福克租了一座小屋每天探索那里安静的海边村庄。

meaning: n. 圣诞老人（等于Santa Claus）

exampleCn: 孩子们写了信给圣诞老人并在圣诞夜在壁炉旁留了一盘肉馅饼。

meaning: n. 改造, 再建\n[医] 改建, 改造, 翻造
example: The reconstruction of the old bridge took nearly three years but the result was absolutely worth the wait.
exampleCn: 那座老桥的重建花了将近三年时间但结果绝对值得等待。

meaning: n. 飞利浦（电子产业集团）；菲利普斯（姓氏）
example: Mr Phillips has been teaching music at the secondary school for so long that he taught three generations.
exampleCn: Phillips 先生在中学教音乐太久了他教过同一个家庭的三代人。

meaning: adv. 贫穷地, 不充分地, 贫乏地\na. 身体不舒服的

exampleCn: 感觉不太好。

meaning: n. 暖和, 加温, 暖热, 温暖, (非正式)打, 鞭打
example: A warming fire.
exampleCn: 温暖的火。

meaning: n. 南安普敦（英国港市）
example: They took a ferry to Southampton and spent the day exploring the old docks and the maritime museum.
exampleCn: 他们坐渡轮去南安普敦花了一天时间探索旧码头和海事博物馆。

meaning: a. 染色的\n[建] 有色的
example: The child colored the drawings.
exampleCn: 孩子给图画上色。

example: The end of the police search was the discovery of a corpse.
exampleCn: 警方搜查的最后发现了一具尸体。

meaning: adv. 突然地, 唐突地
example: The music stopped abruptly and everyone turned to see what had happened on the dance floor behind them.
exampleCn: 音乐突然停了每个人都转过身看身后舞池发生了什么。

meaning: n. 配给面包, 实物工资制\n[经] 实物工资制
example: Tommy learned to fish from his grandfather and now spends every Sunday morning by the quiet river.
exampleCn: 汤米从爷爷那里学会了钓鱼现在每个星期天早上都和儿子在安静的河边钓鱼。

meaning: n. 契约, 协定, 条约\n[化] 合同
example: The two nations signed a historic peace pact that brought an end to decades of bitter and costly.
exampleCn: 两国签署了一项历史性的和平协定结束了数十年的痛苦和代价高昂的冲突。

meaning: adv. 默默地, 静静地

exampleCn: 她默默地在身后关上门悄悄走上楼梯希望不要吵醒熟睡的婴儿。

meaning: n. 哥特风格\na. 哥特式的, 野蛮的

meaning:

meaning:

meaning: n. 符咒, 魅力, 轮值, 轮班, 工作时间, 一次发作\nvt. 拼写, 拼成, 琢磨, 理解, 招致, 轮换, 迷住\nvi. 轮换, 拼字

meaning: n. 传说, 传奇文学, 图例\n[计] 图例

meaning: n. 药丸, 弹丸, 屈辱, 胡说\nv. 做成药丸, 形成丸状, 服药丸, 挫败, 抢劫

meaning:

meaning:

meaning: n. 鞭子, 抽打, 车夫, 搅拌器\nvt. 鞭打, 搅拌, 煽动, 召集, 仓促制成\nvi. 拍击, 急走, 抽打

meaning: a. 值得花时间的, 值得做的, 有真实价值的

meaning: n. 良心\n[法] 良心, 道德感, 正义感

exampleCn: 一个有良知不屈不挠的人。

meaning: a. 有同情心的, 合意的, 赞成的\nn. 交感神经, 容易感受的人
example: Sympathetic neurons.
exampleCn: 交感神经元。

meaning: n. 确定, 确实的事情\n[法] 确定, 肯定, 必然的事
example: His certainty reassured the others.
exampleCn: 他的笃定让其他人都放心了。

meaning: a. 昂贵的, 奢华的, 费用大的
example: Costly jewelry.
exampleCn: 昂贵的珠宝。

example: Most major tennis tournaments last a fortnight.
exampleCn: 大多数主要网球比赛持续两周。

meaning: n. 块, 瘤, 很多, 肿块, 笨人\nvt. 使成块状, 混在一起\nvi. 结块
example: A lump of coal.
exampleCn: 一块煤。

meaning: n. 便士, 一分, 小钱, 点滴\n[经] 便士
example: She found an old penny on the pavement and picked it up for luck as her grandmother.
exampleCn: 她在人行道上发现了一枚旧便士捡起来求好运就像她奶奶一直教她的那样。

example: In the midst of the crowd.
exampleCn: 人群之中。

meaning: n. 剩余物, 废墟, 残余\n[法] 遗体, 尸体, 遗骸
example: I threw out the remains of my dinner.
exampleCn: 我把剩下的晚餐扔掉了。

example: She was known throughout the village for her goodness and for the countless small kindnesses she showed.
exampleCn: 她因善良和每天对每个人无数的小善举而闻名整个村庄。

meaning: vi. 痊愈\nvt. 使复原, 使和解, 治愈
example: The quack pretended to heal patients but never managed to.
exampleCn: 庸医假装可以治愈病人，但从未成功。

meaning: n. 发烧, 发热, 热病\n[医] 发热, 热
example: In a fever of resentment.
exampleCn: 处于怨恨的狂热之中。

meaning: adv. 部分地, 一部分地, 不公平地
example: He was partially paralyzed.
exampleCn: 他部分瘫痪。

meaning:
n. 惊跳, 惊避
a. 胆怯的, 畏缩的, 迟疑的, 羞怯的
vi. 惊退, 乱投, 乱掷, 厌恶, 避开
vt. 乱投, 乱掷
example: He gave the ball a shy to the first baseman.
exampleCn: 他把球传给了一垒手。

meaning: n. 笔记本, 手册, 期票簿
example: She scribbled the idea into her notebook before she forgot it and later turned it into a bestselling.
exampleCn: 她在忘记之前把想法草草写进笔记本后来把它写成了一本畅销小说。

meaning: n. 立即, 瞬间\na. 紧急的, 立即的, 即时的

exampleCn: 即时的满足感。

meaning: a. 狂热的, 热心的, 热烈的
example: Enthusiastic crowds filled the streets.
exampleCn: 街道上挤满了热情的人群。

meaning: vt. 削弱, 减弱, 使虚弱\nvi. 变弱, 变软弱
example: The long illness had weakened him considerably but he refused to give up and slowly regained his strength.
exampleCn: 长期的疾病大大削弱了他的体力但他拒绝放弃并随着时间慢慢恢复了力量。

example: His economics textbook is in its tenth edition.
exampleCn: 他的经济学教科书已经是第十版了。

meaning: a. 奇特的, 罕见的, 特殊的, 特别的\nn. 特有财产, 特权
example: The peculiar aromatic odor of cloves.
exampleCn: 具有丁香特有的芳香气味。

meaning: n. 轮胎\nvt. 装轮胎于
example: He pulled over to change the flat tyre on the side of the motorway as the rain began.
exampleCn: 他把车停在高速公路边换漏气的轮胎这时雨开始倾盆而下。

meaning: n. 好奇心, 新奇的事物, 珍品
example: The child's curiosity about the world around her led to endless questions about why the sky is blue.
exampleCn: 孩子对周围世界的好奇心引发了关于为什么天空是蓝色的鸟为什么会飞的无尽问题。

meaning: n. 机械人, 自动机械, 机械般工作的人\n[计] 机器人; 自动机
example: The factory now uses robots to assemble the products and the workers focus on quality control and design.
exampleCn: 工厂现在使用机器人组装产品工人们则专注于质量控制和设计。

meaning: vt. 弄宽, 加宽, 扩大\nvi. 变宽, 扩大
example: Widen the road.
exampleCn: 拓宽道路。

example: Some people have little power to do good, and have likewise little strength to resist evil.
exampleCn: 有些人行善的力量很小，抵抗邪恶的力量也很小。

meaning: n. 注射, 注射剂\n[化] 注入; 注射
example: The nurse gave him an injection in his left arm and told him to rest for the afternoon.
exampleCn: 护士在他左臂注射了一针让他下午休息。

meaning: a. 垂死的\n[法] 快要死的, 垂死的, 临终的
example: A dying of old hopes.
exampleCn: 旧希望的破灭。

meaning: n. 插, 戳, 刺, 猛推, 口头攻击, 推力\nvt. 插入, 猛推, 刺, 戳, 强加, 延伸\nvi. 插, 刺, 戳, 延伸, (用力)推
example: The thrust of the jet engines.
exampleCn: 喷气发动机的推力。

meaning: a. 相当的, 一致的, 通信的\n[计] 对应
example: My Russian pen pal and I have been corresponding for several years.
exampleCn: 我和我的俄罗斯笔友已经通信好几年了。

meaning: n. 图书馆员, 图书管理员\n[计] 程序库管理程序; 程序库生成程序
example: The librarian helped me find three books about ancient Egypt for my school history project this term.
exampleCn: 图书管理员帮我找到了三本关于古埃及的书供我这学期的学校历史项目使用。

meaning: a. 无用的, 无效的, 无益的\n[机] 无用, 无价值, 无效
example: A kitchen full of useless gadgets.
exampleCn: 厨房里堆满了无用的小玩意。

meaning: n. 山羊, 替罪羊, 色鬼
example: A small white goat was grazing on the hillside near the old stone wall of the farm.
exampleCn: 一只小白山羊在农场老石墙附近的山坡上吃草。

meaning: a. 幸运的, 幸福的
example: Other, less fortunate, children died.
exampleCn: 其他不幸的孩子也死了。

meaning: n. 诱惑, 诱惑物\n[法] 诱惑, 诱惑物
example: He felt the temptation and his will power weakened.
exampleCn: 他感受到了诱惑，意志力也减弱了。

meaning: a. 使人不愉快的, 使人厌恶的, 煞风景的
example: An unpleasant personality.
exampleCn: 性格不讨喜。

meaning: v. 规定, 指定, 嘱咐, 开处方
example: The doctor decided to prescribe a mild painkiller and told her to get plenty of rest.
exampleCn: 医生决定给她开一种温和的止痛药并告诉她要多休息。

meaning: n. 前一天晚上, 一夜的逗留\na. 通宵的, 晚上的, 前夜的\nadv. 在前一夜, 整夜, 昨晚一晚上
example: An overnight trip.
exampleCn: 过夜旅行。

meaning: n. 头痛, 令人头痛之事\n[医] 头痛
example: She had a pounding headache after staring at the computer screen for eight hours without a break.
exampleCn: 她连续盯着电脑屏幕八个小时没休息后头疼得厉害。

meaning: n. 大学本科生, 大学肄业生\na. 大学生的
example: The undergraduate spent her summer working in a research lab alongside two senior professors at the university.
exampleCn: 那位本科生暑假在大学实验室和两位资深教授一起工作。

meaning: n. 发明, 创作能力, 虚构的故事\n[经] 发明
example: The invention of the printing press changed the world forever by making books available to ordinary people everywhere.
exampleCn: 印刷机的发明永远改变了世界使书籍可以被各地普通人获取。

meaning: n. 老虎, 虎, 凶暴的人
example: He's a tiger on the tennis court.
exampleCn: 他是网球场上的猛虎。

meaning: n. 贵族\na. 高贵的, 高尚的, 贵族的, 辉煌的
example: A noble tree.
exampleCn: 高贵的树。

meaning: a. 数学的, 精确的\n[机] 数学上的
example: A mathematical textbook.
exampleCn: 一本数学教科书。

meaning:
n. 增大, 隆起的部分, 巨浪, 肿胀
a. 优秀的, 一流的
vi. 增大, 膨胀, 肿胀, 增强, 骄傲
vt. 使膨胀, 使增大, 使上涨, 使骄傲
example: His ankle began to swell after he twisted it during the football match on Saturday afternoon.
exampleCn: 他周六下午在公园踢足球扭伤脚踝后脚踝开始肿了起来。

meaning: n. 雾, 迷惑, (割后的)最生草, 苔藓\nvi. 被雾笼罩, 变模糊\nvt. 使困惑, 以雾笼罩
example: A thick blanket of fog rolled in from the sea and covered the entire harbour.
exampleCn: 一层浓雾从海上滚来在短短几分钟内覆盖了整个海港。

meaning: a. 以前的, 某一时间的\nadv. 改天, 来日

exampleCn: 我们找个时间聚聚吧。

meaning: adv. 永久, 不变, 持久\n[计] 永久性的
example: He is permanently disabled.
exampleCn: 他永久残疾了。

meaning: n. 唾液, 唾吐, 小雨, 炙叉, 一铲的深度\nvt. 唾吐, 吐出, 降小雨, 用炙叉穿过\nvi. 吐唾沫, 吐痰, 唾弃, 飘霏霏细雨
example: It is considered rude to spit on the ground in most cultures around the world for obvious reasons.
exampleCn: 在世界大多数文化中出于显而易见的原因随地吐痰被认为不礼貌。

meaning: n. 嫌恶\nvt. 讨厌, 不喜欢

exampleCn: 我对他的厌恶是本能的。

meaning: n. 疾病, 不健康, 呕吐\n[医] 病

exampleCn: 毒品已经成为一种无法治愈的疾病。

meaning: a. 喜欢的, 宠爱的, 温柔的
example: A fond embrace.
exampleCn: 一个深情的拥抱。

meaning: n. 电报, 电报机\nvi. 打电报\nvt. 打电报给, 电汇, 流露, 显示出要...的样子
example: The news of the victory was sent by telegraph and reached the capital within just a few short.
exampleCn: 胜利的消息通过电报发出在短短几个小时内就传到了首都。

meaning: n. 记录员, 录音机\nn. 记录器\n[计] 宏录制器, 记录器

exampleCn: 她打开录音机开始口述关于楼上刚结束会议的笔记。

meaning: a. 能干的, 胜任的, 有效的, 足够的\n[经] 有权的, 授权的, 胜任的
example: A competent typist.
exampleCn: 一个称职的打字员。

meaning: a. 忠实的, 详确的, 可靠的\nn. 信徒

exampleCn: 多年忠实服务。

meaning: a. 悲惨的；痛苦的；卑鄙的

exampleCn: 他感到沮丧和痛苦。

meaning: a. 未意识到的, 无意识的, 无知觉的\n[医] 人事不省的, 神志丧失的; 无意识的
example: Lay unconscious on the floor.
exampleCn: 躺在地板上不省人事。

meaning: n. 化学家, 药剂师\n[化] 化学家; 化学师; 化学工作者; 药剂师; 药房
example: The chemist spent years mixing different compounds before finally discovering the formula for the new life-saving medicine.
exampleCn: 化学家花了多年混合不同的化合物才终于发现了这种救命新药的配方。

meaning: a. 快活的, 高兴的, 兴高采烈的

exampleCn: 她性格开朗。

meaning: n. 哭, 哭泣\nvi. 哭泣, 流泪, 哀悼, 滴落\nvt. 哭着使..., 悲叹, 滴下

exampleCn: 看到儿子走上台领取毕业证书时她忍不住喜极而泣。

meaning: n. 凶手, 杀人者, 谋害者\n[法] 谋杀犯, 凶手

exampleCn: 凶手在十年后终于被抓获因为新的DNA证据将他与犯罪现场联系了起来。

exampleCn: 一群人满怀希望地抢到票。

meaning: n. 苏打, 碳酸水\n[化] 纯碱; 苏打; 碳酸钠
example: She ordered a glass of soda with ice and a slice of lemon at the busy café near.
exampleCn: 她在火车站附近忙碌的咖啡馆点了一杯加冰和一片柠檬的苏打水。

meaning: n. 火把, 启发之物\n[化] 火炬

exampleCn: 他打开手电筒把光束指向前方通向洞穴的黑暗隧道。

meaning: n. 终止, 终了, 收场\n[医] 末梢

exampleCn: 我不喜欢以 -ism 作为结尾的单词。

meaning: n. 墨水, 墨汁\nvt. 涂墨水于, 签署, 加墨水

exampleCn: 给钢笔墨水。

meaning: n. 喘气\nvi. 喘气, 喘息, 渴望\nvt. 气喘吁吁地说

exampleCn: 她倒吸了一口气，晕了过去。

meaning: a. 马克思主义的\nn. 马克思主义者

exampleCn: 这位马克思主义学者认为经济力量是长期所有重大历史变革的主要驱动力。

meaning: vt. 窒息, 阻塞, 噎, 抑制\nvi. 窒息, 阻塞, 噎\nn. 窒息, 噎, 阻气门
example: Choke a carburetor.
exampleCn: 堵塞化油器。

meaning: n. 豌豆, 似豌豆的东西

exampleCn: 她从花园里剥了一碗新鲜豌豆丢进炉子上沸腾的水锅里。

meaning: n. 旋转, 循环, 轮流\n[计] 旋转
example: The rotation of the dancer kept time with the music.
exampleCn: 舞者的旋转与音乐保持同步。

meaning: a. 嘈杂的, 喧闹的\n[机] 噪声的, 嘈杂的
example: A noisy cafeteria.
exampleCn: 喧闹的自助餐厅。

example: They pulled into a dusty old motel by the roadside and rented a room for the night.
exampleCn: 他们驶入路边一家满是灰尘的老汽车旅馆租了一间房过夜然后继续旅程。

meaning: n. 憎恨, 仇恨, 憎恶\n[法] 敌意, 憎恨, 憎恶
example: The two families had been locked in a bitter feud for generations and the hatred ran deeper than.
exampleCn: 这两个家族陷入世代宿怨仇恨比任何人能完全解释的都要深。

meaning: n. 重复, 背诵, 循环, 复制品, 副本\n[机] 重复, 反复
example: Learning a new language requires patience and endless repetition before the words and phrases finally start to stick.
exampleCn: 学习一门新语言需要耐心和无尽的重复才能让单词和短语最终牢牢留在记忆中。

meaning: n. 讨厌的东西, 讨厌的人, 损害\n[医] 损害, 讨厌
example: The constant noise from the building site next door had become a real nuisance for everyone living.
exampleCn: 隔壁建筑工地的持续噪音已经成了街上每个住户的真正烦扰。

meaning: a. 坏的, 邪恶的, 缺德的, 刻毒的, 恶劣的, 淘气的
example: Under wicked fire from the enemy's guns.
exampleCn: 在敌人炮火的猛烈攻击下。

meaning: vt. 刺激, 使兴奋, 激励
example: Excite the audience.
exampleCn: 让观众兴奋不已。

meaning: n. 引用语, 语录, 牌价, 报价\n[化] 报价
example: Since he lacks originality he must rely on quotation.
exampleCn: 由于他缺乏原创性，他必须依赖引用。

meaning: n. 惊愕, 惊恐\nvt. 吃惊, 使惊愕\nvi. 惊起
example: The sudden loud crash from the kitchen startled the cat and it bolted up the stairs.
exampleCn: 厨房突如其来的巨响吓了猫一跳它一团毛模糊地窜上了楼梯。

example: The waiter brought the menus and poured two glasses of water before taking their order with a warm.
exampleCn: 服务员拿来菜单倒了两杯水然后用温暖友好的微笑记下他们的点菜。

meaning: v. 大叫, 呼喊, 大声叫
example: The children exclaimed with delight when they saw the pile of brightly wrapped presents under the Christmas tree.
exampleCn: 那天早上孩子们看到圣诞树下那堆包装鲜艳的礼物时高兴得叫了起来。

example: She tired of his perpetual sadness.
exampleCn: 她厌倦了他永远的悲伤。

meaning: n. 桃子, 桃树, 桃色, 美人儿, 极好的事物\nvt. 告发\nvi. 告密, 检举
example: She bit into the ripe peach and the sweet juice ran down her chin as she smiled.
exampleCn: 她咬了一口熟透的桃子甜甜的汁水顺着下巴流下来她朝朋友笑了笑。

meaning: adv. 平滑地, 流畅地, 流利地
example: Put the plans into effect quickly and smoothly.
exampleCn: 快速、顺利地实施计划。

meaning: adv. 在下面\nprep. 在...的下面
example: A chest of drawers all scratched underneath.
exampleCn: 一个抽屉柜下面全都被划伤了。

meaning: n. 售货员, 推销员\n[经] 售货员, 店员, 推销员
example: The salesman knocked on the front door and began his well-rehearsed pitch about the new vacuum cleaner he.
exampleCn: 推销员敲了前门开始了他烂熟于心的关于他正在卖的新吸尘器的推销词。

example: They replaced the old wooden window frames with lightweight aluminium ones that would never rot.
exampleCn: 他们把旧木窗框换成了轻质铝窗框，这种窗框永远不会腐烂。

meaning: a. 心神不安的, 不自在的, 不稳定的, 不舒服的
example: Farmers were uneasy until rain finally came.
exampleCn: 农民们焦躁不安，直到下雨了。

meaning: n. 鼓掌, 喝彩, 赞许
example: The crowd burst into loud applause as the young pianist stood up and took a graceful bow.
exampleCn: 当那位年轻钢琴家站起来在明亮的舞台上优雅鞠躬时人群爆发出响亮的掌声。

meaning: adv. 不寻常地, 异乎寻常地, (非正式)非常
example: She was unusually tall.
exampleCn: 她的身材异常高大。

example: She will arrive presently.
exampleCn: 她马上就到。

meaning: n. 直译程序, 解释者, 口译者, 注释器\n[计] 注释器
example: His paintings reveal a sensitive interpreter of nature.
exampleCn: 他的画作展现了对自然的敏感诠释。

meaning: a. 粗鲁无礼的, 粗陋的, 粗暴的, 原始的, 未开化的, 大略的, 崎岖不平的, 狂暴的
example: Bales of rude cotton.
exampleCn: 一捆捆未经加工的棉花。

meaning: n. 流感, 流行性感冒
example: She caught the flu last winter and stayed in bed with a high fever for days.
exampleCn: 她去年冬天得了流感，发着高烧在床上躺了好几天。

meaning: n. 中尉, 助理人员, 副官

meaning: a. 有秩序的, 整齐的, 值班的\nn. 护理员, 清道夫, 传令兵, 勤务兵\nadv. 依次地, 顺序地
example: The orderly laid out the general's uniform.
exampleCn: 有序地摆放着将军的制服。

meaning: n. 裤子, 长裤, 短衬裤, 女式运动短裤
example: He spilled coffee on his new pants and had to change before the meeting.
exampleCn: 他把咖啡洒在新裤子上，不得不在会议前换衣服。

example: How you can do that is beyond my comprehension.
exampleCn: 你怎么能做到这一点超出了我的理解范围。

meaning: n. 蜜月, 蜜月假期\nvi. 渡蜜月
example: They plan to honeymoon in Hawai'i.
exampleCn: 他们计划去夏威夷度蜜月。

example: She despised people who were cruel to animals and always spoke out loudly whenever she saw any mistreatment.
exampleCn: 她鄙视那些残忍对待动物的人每当看到任何虐待时总是大声说出来。

meaning: a. 可实行的, 可做的, 可用的
example: A practicable solution.
exampleCn: 一个可行的解决方案。

example: The carpenter measured the plank of wood twice before making the cut as his old teacher had taught.
exampleCn: 木匠在锯之前量了两次木板就像很久以前他的老师教他做的那样。

example: His main shortcoming as a leader was his inability to listen to advice from those who disagreed.
exampleCn: 他作为领导的主要缺点是不能听取与自己观点不同的人的建议。

example: They are always correcting my pronunciation.
exampleCn: 他们总是纠正我的发音。

meaning: n. 发明家\n[法] 发明人, 发明家, 创造者
example: The inventor spent years in his workshop building and testing dozens of prototypes before finally perfecting.
exampleCn: 发明家在工作室里花了多年时间制造和测试了几十个原型才终于完善了他最著名的创造。

example: She studied hard for months and did not want to disappoint her parents by failing the entrance exam.
exampleCn: 她刻苦学习了数月不想因医学院入学考试不及格而让父母失望。

example: The downward course of the stream.
exampleCn: 溪流的下降路线。

example: It is easy to misunderstand someone when you communicate only through text messages without hearing the tone.
exampleCn: 当你只通过短信交流而听不到他们语气时很容易误解别人。

example: Mister Johnson has been the headmaster of our village school for so long that he taught three generations.
exampleCn: Johnson 先生做我们村里学校的校长太久了他教过同一个家庭的三代人。

meaning: n. 周日, 平日\n[计] 工作日
example: The museum is closed on weekdays during the winter months and only opens to the public on weekends.
exampleCn: 博物馆冬季月份的工作日闭馆从十一月起仅周末对公众开放。

meaning: a. 表示尊敬的, 有礼貌的, 谦恭的
example: Respectful behavior.
exampleCn: 尊重的行为。

meaning: a. 沉闷的, 冗长乏味的
example: Tedious days on the train.
exampleCn: 火车上的日子很无聊。

meaning: n. 羡慕, 嫉妒\nvt. 羡慕, 嫉妒
example: She felt a small pang of envy when her best friend announced she had won a scholarship.
exampleCn: 当最好的朋友宣布获得了一笔去巴黎学习一年的奖学金时她感到一丝小小的羡慕。

meaning: n. 零售商, 店主, 老板
example: The shopkeeper knew every customer by name and always asked about their families when they came.
exampleCn: 店主能叫出每位顾客的名字他们来买杂货时总是问候他们的家人。

example: She spent every Saturday afternoon baking cakes with her granddaughter in the sunny kitchen of her little cottage.
exampleCn: 她每个星期六下午都在海边小屋阳光明媚的厨房里和孙女一起烤蛋糕。

meaning: a. 不吉利的, 不祥的, 不幸的
example: Friday the 13th is an unlucky date.
exampleCn: 13号星期五是个不吉利的日子。

meaning: a. 亲切的, 慈善的
example: Gracious even to unexpected visitors.
exampleCn: 即使对不速之客也很客气。

meaning: vt. 使欢喜\nvi. 欣喜, 高兴, 庆祝
example: The whole village gathered to rejoice after the long war finally ended.
exampleCn: 漫长的战争终于结束后，全村人聚在一起欢庆。

example: She pushed the door outwards and stepped into the bright sunshine of the garden breathing in the scent.
exampleCn: 她把门向外推开踏入花园明媚的阳光中呼吸着新鲜玫瑰的香气。

meaning: a. 严肃的, 郑重的, 庄严的
example: A solemn promise.
exampleCn: 庄严的承诺。

meaning: a. 强烈的, 寒冷而干燥的, 活泼的\nvt. 使活泼\nvi. 活跃起来
example: A brisk walk in the park.
exampleCn: 在公园里快步散步。

meaning:
a. 愉快的, 高兴的, 宜人的
vt. 恭维, 使高兴, 取笑
vi. 开玩笑
adv. 非常, 极为
example: The jolly crowd at the reunion.
exampleCn: 团聚时欢乐的人群。

meaning: a. 故意的, 与目的有关的\n[法] 故意的, 有意的
example: Intentional damage.
exampleCn: 故意损坏。

meaning: vt. 污染, 弄脏, 玷污\n[化] 污染
example: Factories that pollute the river will face heavy fines under the new law.
exampleCn: 污染河流的工厂将根据新法律面临高额罚款。

meaning: conj. 以免, 唯恐, 免得
example: She spoke in a whisper lest the sleeping baby in the next room should wake up and start.
exampleCn: 她轻声耳语以免隔壁房间熟睡的婴儿醒来再次大声哭闹。

meaning: a. 无价值的, 无益的, 无足轻重的\n[法] 无价值的, 无用的
example: A worthless idler.
exampleCn: 一个毫无价值的闲人。

meaning:
n. 黄褐色, 鞣料, 马戏团
a. 黄褐色的, 鞣皮的
vi. 晒成棕褐色
vt. 把...晒黑, 鞣(革), 狠狠鞭打
example: After two weeks at the beach she returned home with a deep golden tan and a bag full.
exampleCn: 在海滩待了两周后她带着一身深金色的晒痕和一袋贝壳回家了。

example: The shelf was just three centimetres too long to fit into the alcove so he had to trim.
exampleCn: 架子只长了三厘米放不进凹室所以他不得不用锯子把它锯短一点。

meaning: n. 坚实(或沉重)的脚步声, 流浪者\nvi. 践踏, 重步行走, 步行, 流浪\nvt. 走过, 踩
example: A homeless tramp.
exampleCn: 一个无家可归的流浪汉。

meaning: a. 每年的, 一年一度的\nadv. 一年一次, 每年
example: Yearly medical examinations.
exampleCn: 每年进行体检。

meaning: n. 佝偻, 屈从, 弯腰\nvi. 弯下, 屈从, 弯腰, 堕落\nvt. 使屈从, 使弯曲
example: I won't stoop to reading other people's mail.
exampleCn: 我不会屈尊去读别人的邮件。

meaning: n. 运动员, 冒险家
example: He was a true sportsman who always shook hands with his opponent and accepted both victory and defeat.
exampleCn: 他是一个真正的运动员总是与对手握手以同样的优雅和尊严接受胜利和失败。

example: He took a big mouthful of the hot soup and immediately regretted it because it burned his tongue.
exampleCn: 他喝了一大口热汤立刻后悔了因为这确实烫伤了他的舌头。

meaning: n. 序, 绪言, 前言\nvi. 作序, 写前言\nvt. 给...作序, 以...开始
example: She wrote a short preface to the book explaining how she had spent ten years researching the fascinating.
exampleCn: 她为这本书写了一篇简短前言解释了她如何花了十年时间研究这位被遗忘艺术家的迷人一生。

meaning: vt. 使变硬, 使僵硬, 使顽强, 使严厉\nvi. 变粘, 变硬, 变强烈
example: Stiffen the cream by adding gelatine.
exampleCn: 添加明胶使奶油变硬。

meaning: a. 狡猾的, 诡密的, 俏皮的, 偷偷摸摸的

exampleCn: 狡猾如狐狸。

example: The most daring of contemporary fiction writers.
exampleCn: 当代最大胆的小说作家。

meaning: n. 尖锐的响声\nvi. 尖叫, 发尖声\nvt. 尖声发出

exampleCn: 小女孩看到父母带回家给她的那只小狗时发出了一声纯粹的喜悦尖叫。

meaning: a. 荫凉的, 成荫的, 阴暗的, 隐蔽的\n[法] 成问题的, 令人怀疑的
example: A shady operation.
exampleCn: 一次阴暗的操作。

meaning: n. 极限, 最大限度, 极度\na. 极度的, 最远的

exampleCn: 他竭尽全力。

meaning: a. 注意的, 留心的

exampleCn: 注重细节。

meaning: a. 富幽默感的, 滑稽的, 诙谐的

exampleCn: 幽默的故事。

example: He soon regretted his haste.
exampleCn: 很快他就后悔自己的仓促了。

meaning: n. 虚荣心, 虚无, 自负, 空虚, 时髦的小摆饰
example: She checked the mirror out of vanity before walking into the crowded room.
exampleCn: 她出于虚荣照了照镜子，然后走进拥挤的房间。

meaning: n. 生物, 人类\na. 不免一死的, 人类的, 临终的
example: Mortal beings.
exampleCn: 凡人。

example: The robber was caught on camera and the police identified him within hours of the footage being shared.
exampleCn: 强盗被摄像头拍到警方在晚间新闻播放画面后几小时内就确认了他的身份。

meaning: a. 麻烦的, 令人讨厌的

exampleCn: 麻烦的感染。

meaning: a. 生锈的, 腐蚀的, 生疏的, 顽固的, 腐烂的\n[医] 锈色的
example: A rusty machine.
exampleCn: 生锈的机器。

meaning: a. 流利的, 流畅的
example: She is fluent in four languages and works as a translator for the United Nations in Geneva.
exampleCn: 她能流利使用四种语言在日内瓦联合国担任翻译。

meaning: a. 结果实的, 多实的, 产量多的
example: Be fruitful and multiply.
exampleCn: 硕果累累，繁衍生息。

meaning: a. 不公平的\n[法] 不公正的人; 不公正的, 不公平的, 不合理的
example: Unjust punishment.
exampleCn: 不公正的惩罚。

meaning: a. 狡猾的, 巧妙的, 可爱的\n[法] 狡猾的的, 狡诈的, 熟练的
example: Cunning kittens.
exampleCn: 狡猾的小猫。

meaning: a. 无价值的, 徒然的, 空虚的, 自负的, 愚蠢的
example: Vain about her clothes.
exampleCn: 对她的衣服很自负。

meaning: vt. 使悲伤\nvi. 悲痛, 伤心
example: It is natural to grieve after losing someone you love but time slowly heals the deepest.
exampleCn: 失去所爱之人后感到悲痛是自然的但时间会慢慢愈合最深的伤口。

meaning: a. 季度的, 按季度的, 每季的\nadv. 按季, 每三个月, 每季一次\nn. 季刊
example: Quarterly report.
exampleCn: 季度报告。

meaning: a. 无法忍受的, 承受不住的

exampleCn: 小房间里的热度令人无法忍受每个人都用身边能找到的东西给自己扇风。

example: The bolt was just three millimetres too short to reach the hole and he had to rummage.
exampleCn: 螺栓只短了三毫米够不到孔他不得不在抽屉里翻找更长的。

meaning: n. 松紧带, 橡皮筋\na. 有弹性的, 能伸缩的, 可通融的
example: An elastic band.
exampleCn: 一根松紧带。

meaning: n. 电报, 一封电报\n[计] 电报
example: She received a telegram from her brother announcing the birth of his first child on a cold December.
exampleCn: 她在十二月一个寒冷的早晨收到了哥哥发来的电报宣布他第一个孩子的出生。

meaning: a. 跛足的, 僵痛的, 不完全的, 金属薄板, 不知内情的人\nvi. 变跛\nvt. 使成残废, 使无用
example: She wore a gold lame dress.
exampleCn: 她穿着一件金色的蹩脚连衣裙。

meaning: a. 更远的, 进一步的\nadv. 更远的, 此外, far的比较级
example: They live in the farther house.
exampleCn: 他们住在更远的房子里。

meaning: n. 觉醒, 奋起, 干杯\nvt. 唤醒, 鼓舞, 激动, 使振奋, 惊起\nvi. 醒来, 奋起
example: It took a loud knock on the door to rouse him from sleep.
exampleCn: 需要一阵响亮的敲门声才把他从睡梦中唤醒。

meaning: a. 公尺的, 公制的, 计量的\n[医] 测量的, 米制的, 公制的

exampleCn: 将所有测量值转换为公制单位。

meaning: n. 热心, 热衷, 热诚
example: He felt a kind of religious zeal.
exampleCn: 他感受到了一种宗教热情。

meaning: n. 叛逆, 不忠, 叛国罪\n[法] 叛逆, 通敌, 叛国罪

exampleCn: 他被判叛国罪成立因将国家出卖给外国势力被判处终身监禁。

meaning: n. 裂缝, 投币口, 狭长裂口\nvt. 切开, 扯裂, 使有狭缝\nvi. 纵切, 纵裂
example: Slit her throat.
exampleCn: 割断她的喉咙。

meaning: n. 自动化, 自动操作\n[计] 自动学; 自动化

exampleCn: 自动化用机器取代了人类工人。

meaning: n. 晶体管\n[化] 晶体管

exampleCn: 二十世纪四十年代末晶体管的发明彻底改变了电子学并为现代计算机时代铺平了道路。

meaning: n. 口渴, 渴望\nvi. 口渴, 渴望
example: A thirst for knowledge.
exampleCn: 对知识的渴求。

example: She lived in the university dormitory for three years and made some of the closest friends.
exampleCn: 她在大学宿舍住了三年在那里结交了她一生中最亲近的一些朋友。

meaning: vt. 使失去能力, 使残废, (律)使无资格\n[计] 使无效, 禁止, 关闭
example: Disable this command on your computer.
exampleCn: 在您的计算机上禁用此命令。

meaning: vi. 同情, 怜悯, 同意, 体谅
example: I sympathize with your situation and want to help if I can.
exampleCn: 我同情你的处境，如果可以的话也想帮忙。

meaning:
vt. 使清新, 使恢复, 使生气蓬勃
vi. 提起精神, 恢复精神, 吃点心, 喝饮料
vt. 刷新, 重新整理
vi. 刷新, 重新整理
[计] 刷新, 重新整理
example: She splashed cold water on her face to refresh herself before the long and important meeting that afternoon.
exampleCn: 她在下午那个漫长而重要的会议之前用冷水泼了泼脸让自己清新一下。

meaning: a. 胆小的, 羞怯的
example: Whitewater rafting is not for the timid.
exampleCn: 白水漂流不适合胆小的人。

meaning: vt. 加快, 激发, 使有生气, 鼓舞, 使复活\nvi. 加快, 变活跃, 进入胎动期
example: His pace quickened as he turned the corner and saw the bright lights of the train station ahead.
exampleCn: 他拐过街角看到远处火车站明亮的灯光时步子加快了。

example: He bought a liter of fresh milk from the small shop on the corner and carried it home.
exampleCn: 他从街角小店买了一公升新鲜牛奶用棕色纸袋装着拎回了家。

meaning: a. 胜利的, 得胜的, 战胜的
example: The victorious entry.
exampleCn: 胜利进入。

meaning: a. 欢喜的, 高兴的, 令人高兴的
example: Make a joyful noise.
exampleCn: 发出欢乐的声音。

meaning: a. 匆匆的, 轻率的, 性怠的
example: Made a hasty exit.
exampleCn: 匆忙退出。

meaning: a. 不仁慈的, 不亲切的
example: A thoughtless and unkind remark.
exampleCn: 一句轻率且不友善的言论。

meaning: n. 邮递员\n[法] 邮递员, 理财法庭的高级律师
example: The postman arrived at the same time every morning with a cheerful whistle and a bundle of letters.
exampleCn: 邮递员每天早上同一时间到达带着愉快的口哨腋下夹着一捆信。

meaning: n. 轻蔑, 藐视, 嘲笑, 被嘲弄的人\nvt. 轻蔑, 不屑做
example: She looked at the cheap imitation with pure scorn and turned away without saying a single word.
exampleCn: 她以纯粹的轻蔑看着那个廉价仿制品一言不发地转身离开了推销员。

meaning: n. 怪人, 同性恋者\na. 奇怪的, 不舒服的, 可疑的\nvt. 搞糟
example: Something definitely queer about this town.
exampleCn: 这个小镇肯定有些奇怪的地方。

meaning: a. 愤怒的, 愤慨的
example: An indignant denial.
exampleCn: 愤怒的否认。

meaning: n. 琐事, 少量\nvt. 浪费\nvi. 开玩笑, 翻弄, 虚度光阴
example: Do not trifle with safety rules when people are depending on you.
exampleCn: 当别人依赖你时，不要轻视安全规则。

example: The grocer on the corner knew every customer by name and always saved the best apples.
exampleCn: 街角的食品商能叫出每位顾客的名字总是把最好的苹果留给放学后的孩子们。

meaning: a. 熟练的, 巧妙的\n[机] 熟练的
example: A lesser-known but no less skillful composer.
exampleCn: 一位鲜为人知但技巧不减的作曲家。

meaning: n. 朝西的方向\na. 向西的\nadv. 向西的
example: They traveled westward toward the setting sun.
exampleCn: 他们向着夕阳西行。

meaning: n. 胸部, 胸, 胸怀, 内部, 中间\nvt. 怀抱
example: His bosom was bursting with the secret.
exampleCn: 他的胸中充满了这个秘密。

meaning: n. 健身房, 体育馆\n[医] 体育馆, 健身室, 运动场
example: The school gymnasium was packed with parents and students for the annual talent show on Friday evening.
exampleCn: 学校体育馆上周五晚上挤满了前来参加年度才艺表演的家长和学生。

meaning: n. 变压器, 促使变化的人\n[化] 变压器

exampleCn: 暴风雨中电线杆上的变压器爆炸了整个社区陷入黑暗中长达数小时。

meaning: n. 暴风雪\n[化] 雪暴
example: A fierce snowstorm swept through the mountain pass and trapped a dozen cars on the winding road.
exampleCn: 一场猛烈的暴风雪席卷了山口把十几辆车困在蜿蜒的道路上整整两天。

meaning: n. 最坏, 最坏的时候\na. 最坏的, 最恶劣的, 最不利的\nadv. 最坏, 最糟
example: The worst that could happen.
exampleCn: 最坏的情况可能发生。

meaning: a. 象男人的, 强壮的, 适于男人的

exampleCn: 男子气概的运动。

meaning: n. 春天, 春季, 初期
example: The garden looks its most beautiful in springtime when the cherry trees burst into delicate pink and white.
exampleCn: 花园在春天最美丽那时樱桃树绽放出娇嫩的粉白花朵。

meaning: n. 兴奋剂, 补品\na. 热忱的, 诚恳的, 有兴奋作用的
example: Cordial relations.
exampleCn: 关系亲切。

meaning: a. 憎恨的, 可恨的, 可恶的
example: No vice is universally as hateful as ingratitude.
exampleCn: 没有什么恶行比忘恩负义更令人憎恶了。

meaning: vi. 后悔, 懊悔, 忏悔\nvt. 后悔\na. 匍匐生根的
example: He began to repent his harsh words after seeing how deeply they hurt her.
exampleCn: 看到那些刻薄的话深深伤害了她后，他开始后悔。

meaning: n. 圆周, 周缘, 胸围\n[医] 周缘, 环状面
example: He had walked the full circumference of his land.
exampleCn: 他已经走了一圈他的土地。

meaning: n. 观光, 游览\na. 观光的, 游览的
example: They spent their first day in the city sightseeing and visited three museums and the old cathedral.
exampleCn: 他们在城市的第一天游览观光午饭前参观了三家博物馆和老教堂。

example: The old negro spiritual songs have a deep and powerful history rooted in the long struggle for freedom.
exampleCn: 古老的黑人灵歌有着根植于为自由和人的尊严长期斗争的深厚而有力的历史。

meaning: a. 热衷的, 热诚的, 热心的, 热情的
example: She is a zealous supporter of animal rights and spends every weekend volunteering at the local rescue shelter.
exampleCn: 她是动物权利的热心支持者每个周末都在乡下的当地救助站做志愿者。

meaning: n. 会话, 对话\n[计] 对话
example: The dialog in the film felt so natural and real that the audience forgot they were watching actors.
exampleCn: 电影中的对话感觉如此自然真实观众忘记了他们是在屏幕上观看演员。

meaning: vt. 唤醒, 使觉醒, 激发\nvi. 觉醒, 醒来
example: She tiptoed into the room so as not to waken the sleeping baby who had been crying.
exampleCn: 她踮着脚尖走进房间以免吵醒那个昨晚哭了好几个小时的熟睡婴儿。

meaning: n. 放射性\n[化] 放射性
example: The workers wore protective suits to shield themselves from the dangerous radioactivity inside the old damaged reactor core.
exampleCn: 工人们穿着防护服以保护自己免受旧损反应堆核心内部危险的放射性伤害。

meaning: vt. 使烦恼, 使苦恼\nvi. 烦恼
example: Vex the subject of the death penalty.
exampleCn: 恼怒死刑的对象。

meaning: v. 使不愉快, 使(人)生气
example: He was careful not to displease his new boss on the very first day of work.
exampleCn: 在那家重要律师事务所上班的第一天他小心翼翼地不惹新老板不高兴。

meaning: a. 准时的, 守时的, 点状的, 中肯的\n[经] 准时的, 不误期的, 准时
example: She expected guests to be punctual at meals.
exampleCn: 她希望客人准时用餐。

meaning: n. 海港, 港口城市
example: The old seaport is now a quiet town with only a few fishing boats.
exampleCn: 这个老海港现在是一座安静的小镇，只有几艘渔船。

meaning: n. 不名誉, 使人丢脸的人/事, 耻辱, 不光彩\nvt. 使丧失名誉, 使受耻辱, 使丢脸, 奸污, 拒收, 无法偿付, 拒付
example: He would rather die than bring dishonour upon his family name which had been respected in the village.
exampleCn: 他宁愿死也不愿给他家在村里受尊敬多代的家名带来耻辱。

meaning: n. 夸脱\n[医] 夸脱(四分之一加仑)
example: She bought a quart of fresh strawberries from the farm stand and ate half of them before she.
exampleCn: 她从农摊买了一夸脱新鲜草莓还没到家就吃掉了一半。

meaning: n. 运货车, 四轮运货马车, (英)铁路货车, 流动服务车, 小型客车, 囚车, 童车
example: The old waggon loaded with hay creaked slowly along the dusty lane pulled by two tired grey horses.
exampleCn: 装满干草的老牛车在尘土飞扬的小路上吱吱作响在日落时由两匹疲惫的灰马拉着。

example: She sent a card of congratulation to her cousin who had just graduated at the top.
exampleCn: 她给表妹寄了一张祝贺卡表妹刚从医学院以全班第一的成绩毕业。

meaning: a. 周围的, 环境的\n[经] 环境的, 环保的
example: Environmental factors.
exampleCn: 环境因素。

meaning: n. 评估, 估定, 评定的款额\n[化] 评估
example: The assessment for repairs outraged the club's membership.
exampleCn: 维修费用的评估激怒了俱乐部的会员。

meaning: adv. 现在, 当前, 一般, 普通\n[计] 当前
example: Currently they live in Connecticut.
exampleCn: 目前他们住在康涅狄格州。

meaning: n. 失业, 失业人数\n[经] 失业
example: Unemployment is a serious social evil.
exampleCn: 失业是一种严重的社会弊病。

meaning: n. 犯罪, 冒犯, 违反, 罪过, 过错, 攻击\n[法] 犯法, 罪过, 过错
example: He took offence at my question.
exampleCn: 他对我的问题感到生气。

meaning: a. 社团的, 合伙的, 公司的\n[经] 团体的, 法人的, 社团的
example: Corporate rates.
exampleCn: 企业费率。

meaning:
n. 插座, 千斤顶, 男人
vt. 抬起, 提醒, 扛举, 增加, 提高, 放弃
a. 雄的
[计] 插座
example: You don't know jack.
exampleCn: 你不了解杰克。

example: The teachings of Jesus have inspired billions of people around the world for over two thousand years.
exampleCn: 两千多年来耶稣的教导激励了全世界数十亿人。

meaning: n. 会员的资格, 全体会员, 会员数目\n[法] 会员资格, 成员资格, 会籍
example: They polled their membership.
exampleCn: 他们对会员资格进行了民意调查。

meaning: n. 等级, 额定功率, 责骂\n[经] 等级评定
example: The restaurant has a five-star rating and has been voted the best place to eat.
exampleCn: 这家餐厅有五星评级连续三年被评为全市最好的吃饭地方。

meaning: n. 生产者, 制作者, 制作人\n[化] 发生器; (炉煤气)发生炉; 制气炉; 生产者
example: Maine is a leading producer of potatoes.
exampleCn: 缅因州是马铃薯的主要生产国。

meaning: n. 被告\n[经] 被告方
example: The defendant stood up in the courtroom and declared in a steady voice that she was completely innocent.
exampleCn: 被告在法庭上站起身来用沉稳的声音宣布她完全无罪。

meaning: n. 责任, 债务, 倾向\n[经] 责任, 义务, 负债
example: The company admitted liability for the accident and agreed to pay compensation to all the workers.
exampleCn: 公司承认了对事故的责任并同意向所有在现场受伤的工人支付赔偿。

meaning: n. 警告, 预告, 预兆, 通知\n[法] 警告, 警戒, 预告; 警告的, 注意的
example: A warning that still more bombs could explode.
exampleCn: 警告称可能还会有更多炸弹爆炸。

example: The old church on the hill has been standing since the time of Christ and still holds services.
exampleCn: 山上的老教堂自基督时代以来一直矗立着至今每个星期天早上仍在举行礼拜。

meaning: adv. 特定地, 明确地, 按特性
example: A program specifically for teenagers.
exampleCn: 专门针对青少年的节目。

meaning: n. 进行, 程序, 行动, 诉讼程序, 事项\n[化] 会议论文集
example: The court began legal proceedings against the company after dozens of complaints were filed by former employees.
exampleCn: 在前员工提出数十起关于不公平待遇的投诉后法院开始了对该公司的法律诉讼。

meaning: n. 前提, 房屋连地基, 上述各项\nvt. 预先提出, 引出, 作为...的前提\nvi. 作出前提
example: The argument is based on the premise that all people are equal and deserve the same basic human.
exampleCn: 这一论点基于所有人平等并享有相同基本人权和机会的前提。

example: The new youth centre was built with funding from the local council and donations from businesses and residents.
exampleCn: 新的青少年中心由地方议会拨款和全城商家及居民捐款建成。

meaning: n. 治疗\n[医] 疗法, 治疗
example: Heat therapy gave the best relief.
exampleCn: 热疗能起到最好的缓解作用。

meaning: n. 发言人, 代言者
example: The spokesman answered questions from reporters after reading the official statement.
exampleCn: 发言人宣读官方声明后回答了记者的问题。

meaning: n. 结合体, 结合, 联合\n[经] 联合, 联盟
example: The two parties formed a coalition government after neither won enough seats to rule on their own.
exampleCn: 两个政党组成联合政府因为双方在大选中都未能赢得足够的席位单独执政。

meaning: n. 检查员, 巡视员\n[化] 检查员
example: The inspector arrived unannounced at the factory and spent the whole day checking every machine and safety procedure.
exampleCn: 检查员突访工厂花了整整一天详细检查每台机器和安全程序。

meaning: n. 评估, 估价, 求值\n[计] 鉴定; 评价; 求值
example: The teacher gave each student an evaluation with clear advice for improvement.
exampleCn: 老师给每个学生一份评估，并附上明确的改进建议。

meaning: n. 退休, 隐居, 撤退\n[经] 退休, 退股, (固定资产)报废
example: He took early retirement at sixty and spent the next decade travelling the world and writing a book.
exampleCn: 他六十岁提前退休在接下来的十年里环游世界并写了一本关于他许多冒险的书。

example: The Duke owned a vast estate in the countryside and was known for his generosity to the villagers.
exampleCn: 公爵在乡下拥有大片庄园以对住在他土地上的村民慷慨大方而闻名。

example: He picked up his guitar and began to play a soft melody that filled the quiet room.
exampleCn: 他拿起吉开始弹奏一段轻柔的旋律温暖柔和的声音充满了安静的房间。

meaning: n. 历史学家, 记事者
example: The historian spent years in dusty archives piecing together the long-forgotten story of the medieval village.
exampleCn: 历史学家在满是灰尘的档案室里花了多年拼凑出河边那个中世纪村庄久被遗忘的故事。

meaning: a. 临床的, 门诊部的\n[医] 临床的, 临证的
example: Clinical observation.
exampleCn: 临床观察。

meaning: n. 难民, 流亡者\n[法] 避难者, 流亡者, 难民
example: The refugee family fled their homeland with nothing but the clothes on their backs and a small bag.
exampleCn: 那个难民家庭逃离家园时身上除了穿的衣服和一小袋照片和证件外一无所有。

meaning:
n. 臀部, 蔷薇果, 忧郁
a. 熟悉内情的
vt. 使忧郁, 给(屋顶)造屋脊
interj. 喝彩声
example: She broke her hip in a fall on the icy pavement and had to spend six weeks.
exampleCn: 她在结冰的人行道上摔断了髋骨不得不在医院住了六周从手术中恢复。

meaning: n. 所赚的钱, 工资, 收入\n[经] 工资, 收入, 收益, 盈余
example: They saved a quarter of all their earnings.
exampleCn: 他们把四分之一的收入存起来。

meaning: a. 怀孕的, 充满的, 思想丰富的, 成果丰硕的\n[医] 妊娠的, 有孕的
example: A silence pregnant with suspense.
exampleCn: 沉默中充满了悬念。

meaning: n. 诉讼\n[法] 诉讼, 诉讼案件
example: The tenants filed a lawsuit against the landlord for failing to repair the heating system during the coldest.
exampleCn: 房客对房东提起了诉讼因为他在几十年来最冷的冬天未修好供暖系统。

meaning: n. 证言, 证据, 声明\n[医] 证据
example: According to his own testimony he can't do it.
exampleCn: 根据他自己的证词，他做不到。

example: When you work hard and never give up on your dreams success will inevitably follow sooner or later.
exampleCn: 当你努力工作永不放弃梦想时成功迟早会以某种形式不可避免地随之而来。

meaning: n. 牛仔裤, 牛仔布, 斜纹棉布
example: She pulled on her favourite pair of jeans and a cosy jumper before heading out into the chilly.
exampleCn: 她穿上最喜欢的那条牛仔裤和舒适的套头衫走进寒冷的秋晨散步。

meaning: a. 占优势的, 支配的\n[医] 优性的, 显性的
example: Television plays a dominant role in molding public opinion.
exampleCn: 电视在塑造公众舆论方面发挥着主导作用。

meaning: n. 参议员, (某些大学的)理事\n[法] 参议员, 上议员
example: The senator gave a passionate speech about the need for better healthcare in rural communities across the state.
exampleCn: 参议员就她所代表的州内农村社区需要更好的医疗保健发表了热情洋溢的演讲。

meaning: n. 恐怖分子\n[法] 恐怖份子, 恐怖主义
example: The police managed to track down the terrorist before he could carry out his planned attack.
exampleCn: 警方设法在恐怖分子实施对拥挤城市广场的计划袭击之前追踪到了他。

meaning: n. 长官, 法官, 推事\n[法] 司法行政官, 治安法官, 地方法官
example: The magistrate made a fair ruling after hearing both sides of the case.
exampleCn: 地方法官听取双方意见后做出了公正裁决。

meaning: n. 违反, 违背, 妨碍\n[法] 违犯, 违背, 违反
example: He claimed a violation of his rights under the Fifth Amendment.
exampleCn: 他声称这侵犯了他根据第五修正案享有的权利。

example: The detective spent weeks piecing together the clues until she finally solved the mystery that had baffled.
exampleCn: 侦探花了数周拼凑线索直到她最终解开了困扰整个警察队伍多时的谜团。

meaning: n. 能力, 性能, 约束力\n[化] 能力
example: He worked to the limits of his capability.
exampleCn: 他竭尽全力工作。

example: Athletic facilities.
exampleCn: 体育设施。

meaning: n. 斗士, 战士, 好战者, 战斗机
example: He was a fierce fighter in the ring but a gentle and kind person the moment he stepped.
exampleCn: 他在擂台上是一名凶猛的斗士但铃响后他走出擂台的那一刻就成了温柔善良的人。

meaning: n. 完成\n[经] 完井, 结束, 完工
example: The completion of the new bridge was celebrated with a ceremony attended by the mayor and hundreds.
exampleCn: 新桥的竣工通过上周六市长和数百名当地居民参加的仪式来庆祝。

example: They spent the rainy afternoon wandering around the shopping mall and ended up buying nothing except a cup.
exampleCn: 他们下雨的下午在购物中心闲逛最后除了买一杯热咖啡什么都没买。

meaning: n. 隐私, 隐居, 秘密\n[计] 个人保密权
example: She valued her privacy above all else and chose to live in a remote cottage.
exampleCn: 她最看重自己的隐私选择住在远离喧嚣城镇的偏远小屋里。

meaning: n. 印刷工, 打印机\n[计] 打印机
example: The printer ran out of ink halfway through the job and he had to rush to the shop.
exampleCn: 打印机打到一半没墨了他不得不赶去商店买新墨盒以赶在截止日期前。

example: Islam is predominant in northern Africa, the Middle East, Pakistan, and Indonesia.
exampleCn: 伊斯兰教在北非、中东、巴基斯坦和印度尼西亚占主导地位。

meaning: n. 叙述, 故事\na. 叙述的, 叙事的, 故事体的
example: His narrative was interesting.
exampleCn: 他的叙述很有趣。

meaning: n. 保证, 把握, 信心, 保险\n[经] 保证, 担保, 保险
example: His assurance in his superiority did not make him popular.
exampleCn: 他对自己优越性的自信并没有使他受欢迎。

meaning: n. 改革, 创新\n[法] 创新, 改革, 刷新
example: The company invests heavily in innovation and has been granted over a hundred new patents.
exampleCn: 公司大力投资创新仅在过去五年就获得了一百多项新专利。

meaning: prep. 对...\n[法] 诉, 对, 相形
example: The final match of the tournament was Brazil versus Argentina and the whole world tuned in to watch.
exampleCn: 锦标赛最后一场比赛是巴西对阿根廷全世界都在收看这场激动人心的对决。

meaning: a. 令人不快的, 侮辱的, 攻击性的\n[法] 攻击的, 进攻的, 冒犯的
example: Considered such depravity offensive against all laws of humanity.
exampleCn: 认为这种堕落行为违反了所有人类法律。

meaning: n. 露齿笑\nv. 露齿而笑
example: She gave a shy grin when the teacher praised her essay in front of the whole class.
exampleCn: 当老师在全班面前表扬她的作文并给大家朗读了一段时她害羞地咧嘴笑了。

meaning: a. 合法的, 正当的, 婚生的\nvt. 认为正当, 立为嫡嗣, 使合法
example: Legitimate advertising practices.
exampleCn: 合法的广告行为。

meaning: n. 教员, 讲师\n[法] 指导者, 教员, 讲师
example: The driving instructor sat patiently in the passenger seat and guided her through the busy city streets.
exampleCn: 驾驶教练耐心地坐在副驾驶座上在她第一堂课时引导她穿过繁忙的城市街道。

meaning: n. 道德规范\n[医] 伦理学
example: The course on medical ethics challenged students to think deeply about the moral dilemmas doctors face.
exampleCn: 医学伦理学课程挑战学生深入思考医生在日常工作中面临的道德困境。

meaning: adv. 按自然规律, 完全地, 实际上, 真正地, 身体上地
example: It is physically impossible.
exampleCn: 这在物理上是不可能的。

meaning: n. 分界面, 接触面, 界面\n[计] 接口, 界面
example: The interface between chemistry and biology.
exampleCn: 化学和生物学之间的界面。

meaning: n. 手迹, 手稿, 正本, 手写体\nvt. 改编为演出本\n[计] 手写体, 小型程序
example: The actor spent weeks memorising the script before rehearsals began and could recite every single line by heart.
exampleCn: 演员花了数周熟记剧本排练开始前他在第一天就能背诵每句台词了。

meaning: n. 处方, 命令, 指定\n[医] 处方, 药方
example: I tried to follow her prescription for success.
exampleCn: 我试图遵循她的成功处方。

meaning: n. 怀孕；丰富, 多产；意义深长
example: She felt tired and nauseous during the early stages of her pregnancy but her husband was there.
exampleCn: 她在怀孕早期感到疲倦和恶心但她丈夫在每一步都给予支持。

meaning: a. 在下面的\n[经] 优先的, 基础的, 放在下面的
example: An underlying meaning.
exampleCn: 一个潜在的意义。

meaning: n. 适合, 合宜, 合理, 恰当, 健康\n[医] 适合性, 适应性
example: They had to prove their fitness for the position.
exampleCn: 他们必须证明自己适合这个职位。

meaning: a. 边缘的, 最低限度的, 有旁注的\n[医] 缘的
example: The marginal strip of beach.
exampleCn: 海滩的边缘地带。

meaning: n. 组成, 性格, 化妆品, 化装(术), 虚构, 补考
example: He missed the test and had to take a makeup.
exampleCn: 他错过了考试，不得不化妆。

meaning: adv. 彻底地, 绝对地, 透彻地, 详尽地, 周到地, 完全地, 完善地, 全面地
example: We searched the files thoroughly.
exampleCn: 我们彻底搜查了这些文件。

meaning:
a. 绝对的, 全然的, 纯粹的, 透明的, 峻峭的
vi. 偏转, 偏航
vt. 使急转向, 使偏航
adv. 完全, 全然, 峻峭
n. 偏航
example: Got the job through sheer persistence.
exampleCn: 凭借纯粹的坚持才得到了这份工作。

meaning: n. 长沙发, 睡椅, 卧榻\nvt. 横躺, 表达\nvi. 躺下, 蹲伏
example: He collapsed onto the couch after a long day at work and fell asleep within minutes still wearing.

meaning: a. 极度的, 华丽的, 极好的

meaning: vi. 顺从, 依从\n[法] 遵守, 承诺, 照做

meaning: n. 相互关系, 相关, 关联\n[医] 相关, 联系

meaning: a. 外交的, 老练的\n[法] 外交的, 外交上的, 文献上的

example: She decided to dedicate her life to helping others and joined a medical charity working.

example: Hitherto unknown documents found in the old library shed new light on the mysterious disappearance of the famous.

example: A cooperative effort.

meaning: a. 悲惨的, 悲剧的

example: She ordered a rich chocolate cake for dessert and ate every last crumb with a smile of pure.

meaning: n. 攀缘, 爬行, 抢夺, 混乱, 紧急起飞\nvi. 攀缘, 杂乱蔓延, 争夺, 拼凑, 匆忙\nvt. 攀登, 扰乱, 使混杂

meaning:

meaning: a. 数字的, 数值的, 以数字表示的, 擅长于计数的\n[经] 数字的, 用数字表示的

example: The doctor gave her some medicine to alleviate the pain in her back and told her to rest.

meaning:

example: Uranium is the primary fuel used in nuclear power plants and must be mined and processed.
exampleCn: 铀是核电站使用的主要燃料必须极其小心精准地开采和加工以确保安全。

exampleCn: 董事会决定召集紧急会议讨论销售的骤然下降并决定公司的明确行动方针。

exampleCn: 她性情冷静平和这使她非常适合空中交通管制员那份压力大要求高的工作。

example: The farmer planted a field of barley in early spring and by late summer the golden stalks.
exampleCn: 农民早春种下一块大麦田到夏末金黄的麦秆在温暖的晚风中轻轻摇曳。

meaning: n. 胡桃\n[机] 胡桃木

exampleCn: 他啪的一声敲开了一颗核桃把碎壳丢进桌边窗旁的碗里。

meaning:

exampleCn: 机械师检查了车轮的定位做了一些小的调整才把车送回路上试驾。

exampleCn: 他在拥挤的房间里向她快速使了个眼色她立刻知道从那一刻起一切都会好起来的。

exampleCn: 书中记载了一位在二十世纪初独自穿越非洲沙漠的女性的非凡一生。
